## File: src/app/features/taxpayer-portal/pages/portal-application-status/portal-application-status.component.html
```html
<div class="status-shell">

  <!-- Nav -->
  <header class="status-nav">
    <div class="nav-brand">
      <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none">
        <rect width="28" height="28" rx="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)"/>
        <path d="M14 4L24 9V14C24 19.5 19.5 24 14 24C8.5 24 4 19.5 4 14V9L14 4Z"
              fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.9)"/>
        <path d="M10 14L13 17L18 11" stroke="#1a7a4a" stroke-width="2"
              stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      </svg>
      <div>
        <div class="brand-name">NBR Portal</div>
        <div class="brand-sub">Government of Bangladesh</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-logout" (click)="logout()">
      <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
        <path d="M6 2H3a1 1 0 00-1 1v10a1 1 0 001 1h3M10 11l3-3-3-3M13 8H6"
              stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      </svg>
      Sign out
    </button>
  </header>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-wrap" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner"></div>
    <p>Loading your application...</p>
  </div>

  <div class="status-body" *ngIf="!isLoading">

    <!-- PENDING_REVIEW -->
    <ng-container *ngIf="isPending">
      <div class="status-card">
        <div class="status-icon pending">
          <svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none">
            <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="22" stroke="#e67e22" stroke-width="2.5"/>
            <path d="M24 14v12l7 4" stroke="#e67e22" stroke-width="2.5"
                  stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <h1 class="status-title">Application Under Review</h1>
        <p class="status-sub">
          Your registration has been submitted and is currently being reviewed
          by our officers. This typically takes <strong>2–5 working days</strong>.
        </p>

        <div class="info-grid">
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="info-label">Applicant</div>
            <div class="info-value">{{ displayName }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="info-label">Status</div>
            <div class="info-value">
              <span class="badge pending-badge">Pending Review</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="info-label">Type</div>
            <div class="info-value">{{ taxpayer?.taxpayerType?.typeName || '—' }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="info-label">Application Ref</div>
            <div class="info-value mono">#{{ taxpayer?.id || '—' }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="timeline">
          <div class="tl-item done">
            <div class="tl-dot done-dot">✓</div>
            <div class="tl-body">
              <div class="tl-title">Application Submitted</div>
              <div class="tl-sub">Your registration form has been received</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item active">
            <div class="tl-dot active-dot"></div>
            <div class="tl-body">
              <div class="tl-title">Under Officer Review</div>
              <div class="tl-sub">An NBR officer is reviewing your documents</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item todo">
            <div class="tl-dot todo-dot"></div>
            <div class="tl-body">
              <div class="tl-title">TIN Issuance</div>
              <div class="tl-sub">Your TIN will be issued upon approval</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item todo">
            <div class="tl-dot todo-dot"></div>
            <div class="tl-body">
              <div class="tl-title">Portal Access Granted</div>
              <div class="tl-sub">Full portal access will be activated</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="help-box">
          <div class="help-icon">💡</div>
          <div>
            <strong>Need help?</strong> Contact your nearest NBR office or
            call the helpdesk at <strong>16579</strong> with your application
            reference number.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </ng-container>

    <!-- REJECTED -->
    <ng-container *ngIf="isRejected">
      <div class="status-card">
        <div class="status-icon rejected">
          <svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none">
            <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="22" stroke="#c0392b" stroke-width="2.5"/>
            <path d="M16 16l16 16M32 16L16 32" stroke="#c0392b" stroke-width="2.5"
                  stroke-linecap="round"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <h1 class="status-title">Application Rejected</h1>
        <p class="status-sub">
          Unfortunately, your registration application could not be approved
          at this time. Please review the reason below and reapply.
        </p>

        <div class="reject-reason" *ngIf="reviewNotes">
          <div class="rr-label">Reason for rejection</div>
          <div class="rr-text">{{ reviewNotes }}</div>
        </div>

        <div class="info-grid">
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="info-label">Applicant</div>
            <div class="info-value">{{ displayName }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="info-label">Status</div>
            <div class="info-value">
              <span class="badge rejected-badge">Rejected</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="help-box error">
          <div class="help-icon">📞</div>
          <div>
            To appeal this decision or reapply, contact your nearest NBR
            office with your application reference <strong>#{{ taxpayer?.id }}</strong>.
            Helpdesk: <strong>16579</strong>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </ng-container>

  </div>

  <footer class="status-footer">
    <span>© {{ currentYear }} National Board of Revenue, Bangladesh</span>
    <span>·</span>
    <span>Secure Government Portal</span>
  </footer>
</div>
```

```css
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════

   Color palette: teal (#1a9e7e, #1a7a4a), blue (#1a3f8f), white cards

⋮----

.itr-header {

⋮----
.stat-card {
⋮----
.stat-icon {

.stat-icon.amber  { background: #faeeda; color: #c67c0a; }
.stat-icon.red    { background: #fce8e8; color: #c0392b; }
⋮----
.stat-body { flex: 1; }
⋮----
.stat-value {
⋮----

.stat-value.amber  { color: #c67c0a; }
.stat-value.red    { color: #c0392b; }
⋮----
.stat-label {
⋮----
/* ── Loading ── */
.loading-state {
⋮----
.spinner {
⋮----
/* ── Empty state ── */
.empty-state {
⋮----

⋮----
.empty-state h4 {
⋮----
.empty-state p {
⋮----
/* ── Filter Tabs ── */
.filter-tabs {
⋮----
.ftab {
⋮----
.ftab:hover        { border-color: #ccc; }
.ftab.active       { background: #1a3f8f; color: #fff; border-color: #1a3f8f; }
.ftab.submitted.active  { background: #1a3f8f; border-color: #1a3f8f; }
.ftab.review.active     { background: #7c3aed; border-color: #7c3aed; }
.ftab.accepted.active   { background: #1a7a4a; border-color: #1a7a4a; }
.ftab.draft.active      { background: #64748b; border-color: #64748b; }
.ftab.overdue.active    { background: #c0392b; border-color: #c0392b; }
⋮----
.ftab-count {
⋮----
.ftab.active .ftab-count {
⋮----
/* ── ITR Return Card ── */
.returns-list {
⋮----
.itr-card {
⋮----
.itr-card:hover {
⋮----
.itr-card-header {
⋮----
.return-no {
⋮----
.return-year {
⋮----
/* ── Status badges ── */
.status-badge {
⋮----
.status-draft     { background: #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; }
.status-submitted { background: #e6f1fb; color: #185fa5; }
.status-review    { background: #f3e8ff; color: #7c3aed; }
.status-accepted  { background: #e1f5ee; color: #1a7a4a; }
.status-rejected  { background: #fce8e8; color: #c0392b; }
.status-overdue   { background: #fff3cd; color: #92400e; }
.status-amended   { background: #faeeda; color: #854f0b; }
.status-sendback  { background: #fce8e8; color: #9a3412; }
⋮----
/* ── Card body ── */
.itr-card-body {
⋮----
.itr-stat {
⋮----
.itr-stat:last-child { border-right: none; }
⋮----
.itr-stat-label {

.itr-stat-value {
⋮----
.itr-stat-value.tax    { color: #c0392b; }
.itr-stat-value.refund { color: #1a7a4a; }
⋮----
/* ── Overdue warning ── */
.overdue-warning {
⋮----
/* ── Card footer ── */

⋮----
.itr-card-meta {
⋮----
.itr-card-meta span {
⋮----
.itr-card-actions {
⋮----
.btn-action {

⋮----
.btn-action.wealth {

.btn-link {
⋮----
/* ── Help Box ── */
.help-box {
⋮----
.help-icon { font-size: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; }
⋮----
.help-text {
⋮----
/* ── Responsive ── */
⋮----
.itr-stat { border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; }
.itr-stat:nth-child(odd) { border-right: 1px solid #f0f0f0; }
.itr-stat:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
⋮----
.stats-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
.itr-card-body { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.itr-stat { border-right: none; }
```

## File: src/app/features/user-management/pages/user-create/user-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Add New User</h4>
    <p>Create a new system user with role and access.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List</button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}</div>
<div class="alert-error"   *ngIf="errorMsg"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
      <div><h6 class="section-title">Personal Information</h6><span class="section-sub">Basic user details</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Full Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Enter full name" [(ngModel)]="form.fullName" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Username</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-at input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. tax_off_01" [(ngModel)]="form.username" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Email Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input" placeholder="user@nbr.gov.bd" [(ngModel)]="form.email" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple"><i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i></div>
      <div><h6 class="section-title">Role & Access</h6><span class="section-sub">User role, department and status</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Role</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.role">
            <option value="">Select Role</option>
            <option *ngFor="let r of roles" [value]="r">{{ r }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Department</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.department">
            <option value="">Select Department</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of departments" [value]="d">{{ d }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-key-fill"></i></div>
      <div><h6 class="section-title">Password</h6><span class="section-sub">Set initial password</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Password</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-lock input-icon"></i>
          <input type="password" class="form-input" placeholder="Min 8 characters" [(ngModel)]="form.password" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Confirm Password</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="password" class="form-input"
            [class.error-input]="passwordMismatch"
            placeholder="Re-enter password" [(ngModel)]="form.confirmPassword" />
        </div>
        <span class="password-error" *ngIf="passwordMismatch">Passwords do not match</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel</button>
    <button class="btn-reset"  (click)="onReset()"  [disabled]="isLoading"><i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset</button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-person-plus-fill"></i> Create User</span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Creating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit User</h4>
    <p>Update user profile and access settings.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View</button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}</div>
<div class="alert-error"   *ngIf="errorMsg"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}</div>
<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading"><div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div></div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.fullName }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-sub">@{{ form.username }}</span>
  </div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
      <div><h6 class="section-title">Personal Information</h6><span class="section-sub">Name and contact details</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Full Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.fullName" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Username</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-at input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.username" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Email</label>
           <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="email" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.email" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
        </div>
        <div class="section-divider"></div>
        <div class="form-section">
          <div class="section-header">
            <div class="section-icon purple"><i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i></div>
            <div><h6 class="section-title">Role & Access</h6><span class="section-sub">Update role, department and status</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-grid">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label required">Role</label>
              <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
                <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.role">
                  <option *ngFor="let r of roles" [value]="r">{{ r }}</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label">Department</label>
              <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
                <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.department">
                  <option *ngFor="let d of departments" [value]="d">{{ d }}</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label">Status</label>
              <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
                <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
                  <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-actions">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
            <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update User</span>
            <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
          </button>
      </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/user-management/pages/user-view/user-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>User Details</h4>
    <p>Full user profile and access information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back</button>
    <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN']" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading"><div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div></div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && user">

  <!-- Profile Header -->
  <div class="user-header-card" [ngClass]="getRoleClass(user.role) + '-bg'">
    <div class="uhc-left">
      <div class="uhc-avatar">{{ user.fullName.charAt(0) }}</div>
      <div>
        <div class="uhc-name">{{ user.fullName }}</div>
        <div class="uhc-username">@{{ user.username }}</div>
        <div class="uhc-meta">
          <span class="role-pill">{{ getRoleLabel(user.role) }}</span>
          <span class="dept-pill">{{ user.department }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(user.status)">{{ user.status }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="uhc-right">
      <div class="uhc-stat">
        <span class="uhs-label">Last Login</span>
        <span class="uhs-value">{{ user.lastLogin }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="uhc-stat">
        <span class="uhs-label">Member Since</span>
        <span class="uhs-value">{{ user.createdAt }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="details-grid">

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i><span>Personal Information</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Full Name</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ user.fullName }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Username</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">@{{ user.username }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Email</span><span class="detail-value">{{ user.email }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i><span>Access & Role</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Role</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ getRoleLabel(user.role) }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Department</span><span class="detail-value">{{ user.department }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Status</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(user.status)">{{ user.status }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Last Login</span><span class="detail-value">{{ user.lastLogin }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Created At</span><span class="detail-value">{{ user.createdAt }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/components/business-picker/business-picker.component.html
```html
<!-- ── Loading ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="loading-row" *ngIf="loading" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:12px 0;">
  <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
  <span style="font-size:13px;color:#888;">Loading businesses…</span>
</div>

<!-- ── No businesses ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="!loading && businesses.length === 0">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i>
  This taxpayer has no registered businesses.
  <a routerLink="/businesses/create" class="ms-1 fw-bold">Register a business first →</a>
</div>

<!-- ── Business list ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="business-picker" *ngIf="!loading && businesses.length > 0">
  <div
    class="biz-row"
    *ngFor="let b of businesses"
    [class.biz-selected]="selected?.id === b.id"
    [class.biz-registered]="b.vatRegistered"
    (click)="onSelect(b)"
    [title]="b.vatRegistered ? 'Already VAT registered — BIN: ' + b.binNo : 'Click to select'"
  >
    <!-- Icon -->
    <div class="biz-icon">
      <i class="bi bi-building-check" *ngIf="b.vatRegistered"></i>
      <i class="bi bi-building" *ngIf="!b.vatRegistered"></i>
    </div>

    <!-- Info -->
    <div class="biz-info">
      <span class="biz-name">{{ b.businessName }}</span>
      <span class="biz-meta">
        <span class="code-sm me-2">{{ b.businessRegNo }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="b.tradeLicenseNo">TL: {{ b.tradeLicenseNo }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="b.businessTypeName"> · {{ b.businessTypeName }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="b.districtName"> · {{ b.districtName }}</span>
      </span>
    </div>

    <!-- VAT status badge -->
    <div class="biz-vat-status">
      <!-- Already registered -->
      <ng-container *ngIf="b.vatRegistered">
        <span class="bin-badge">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ b.binNo }}
        </span>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(b.vatStatus)">
          {{ b.vatStatus }}
        </span>
      </ng-container>

      <!-- Not yet registered -->
      <ng-container *ngIf="!b.vatRegistered">
        <span class="no-bin-badge" [class.active]="selected?.id === b.id">
          <i class="bi bi-plus-circle" *ngIf="selected?.id !== b.id"></i>
          <i class="bi bi-check2-circle" *ngIf="selected?.id === b.id"></i>
          {{ selected?.id === b.id ? 'Selected' : 'Register VAT' }}
        </span>
      </ng-container>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/components/taxpayer-search/taxpayer-search.component.html
```html
<!-- ── Search Row ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="search-row">
  <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
    <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
    <input
      type="text"
      class="form-input"
      placeholder="Enter TIN number, NID or taxpayer name…"
      [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
      [ngModelOptions]="{ standalone: true }"
      (ngModelChange)="onInputChange()"
      (keyup.enter)="onSearch()"
      [disabled]="isLocked"
    />
    <button
      *ngIf="isLocked"
      type="button"
      class="clear-btn"
      title="Clear selection"
      (click)="onClear()"
    >
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

  <button
    type="button"
    class="btn-search"
    (click)="onSearch()"
    [disabled]="isSearching || isLocked"
  >
    <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
    <span *ngIf="isSearching">
      <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Searching…
    </span>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- ── Search Results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
  <div
    class="result-item"
    *ngFor="let tp of searchResults"
    (click)="onSelect(tp)"
    [class.disabled]="isIneligible(tp)"
    [title]="isIneligible(tp) ? 'Taxpayer is suspended and cannot be registered for VAT.' : ''"
  >
    <div class="result-avatar">
      <i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="result-info">
      <span class="result-name">{{ getDisplayName(tp) }}</span>
      <span class="result-meta">
        <span *ngIf="tp.tinNumber" class="fw-bold me-2">TIN: {{ tp.tinNumber }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="tp.phone"> · {{ tp.phone }}</span>
        <span
          *ngIf="isIneligible(tp)"
          class="ms-2"
          style="color:#e74c3c;font-weight:700"
        >⚠ Suspended</span>
      </span>
    </div>
    <span class="result-badge" *ngIf="!isIneligible(tp)">Select</span>
    <span
      class="result-badge"
      *ngIf="isIneligible(tp)"
      style="background:#fff0f0;color:#e74c3c"
    >Ineligible</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── No Results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="hasSearched && searchResults.length === 0">
  <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>
  No taxpayer found. Try a different TIN, NID, or name.
</div>

<!-- ── Selected Taxpayer Card ─────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="selected-card" *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer">
  <div class="selected-card-left">
    <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i></div>
    <div>
      <p class="selected-name">{{ displayName }}</p>
      <p class="selected-meta">
        <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber">TIN: {{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.phone"> · {{ selectedTaxpayer.phone }}</span>
        <span class="ms-2" style="font-size:11px;opacity:0.8">
          — {{ selectedTaxpayer.taxpayerType?.typeName }}
        </span>
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="autofill-tag">
    <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Selected
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/pages/vat-registration-success/vat-registration-success.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>VAT Registration</h4>
    <p>Registration submitted successfully.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" type="button" (click)="goToView()">
    <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View Registration
  </button>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="registration">

  <!-- ══ Hero Card ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <div class="success-hero" [class.animate-in]="animateIn">

    <!-- Status row -->
    <div class="success-hero-top">
      <div class="success-check-circle">
        <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p class="success-headline">VAT Registration Submitted</p>
        <p class="success-subline">
          Your registration is pending review by a VAT commissioner.
        </p>
      </div>
      <span class="status-badge status-pending ms-auto flex-shrink-0">
        Pending
      </span>
    </div>

    <!-- BIN display -->
    <div class="success-bin-wrap">
      <span class="success-bin-label">
        <i class="bi bi-upc-scan"></i>
        Business Identification Number (BIN)
      </span>
      <div class="success-bin-row">
        <span class="success-bin">{{ registration.binNo }}</span>
        <button
          type="button"
          class="btn-copy-bin"
          [class.copied]="binCopied"
          (click)="copyBin()"
          title="Copy BIN to clipboard"
        >
          <i class="bi"
             [class.bi-clipboard]="!binCopied"
             [class.bi-clipboard-check-fill]="binCopied">
          </i>
          {{ binCopied ? 'Copied!' : 'Copy' }}
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Meta strip: business · TIN · zone · date -->
    <div class="success-meta-row">

      <div class="success-meta-item">
        <span class="success-meta-label">Business</span>
        <span class="success-meta-value">{{ registration.businessName }}</span>
      </div>

      <div class="success-meta-divider"></div>

      <div class="success-meta-item">
        <span class="success-meta-label">TIN</span>
        <span class="success-meta-value" style="font-family:var(--font-mono)">
          {{ registration.tinNumber }}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="success-meta-divider"></div>

      <div class="success-meta-item">
        <span class="success-meta-label">VAT Zone</span>
        <span class="success-meta-value">{{ registration.vatZone }}</span>
      </div>

      <div class="success-meta-divider"></div>

      <div class="success-meta-item">
        <span class="success-meta-label">Registered On</span>
        <span class="success-meta-value">{{ registration.registrationDate }}</span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div><!-- /success-hero -->

  <!-- ══ Status Timeline ═════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <div class="status-timeline-card">
    <p class="timeline-title">
      <i class="bi bi-diagram-2-fill"></i> Registration Progress
    </p>
    <div class="status-timeline">

      <div class="timeline-step done">
        <div class="ts-dot"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i></div>
        <span class="ts-label">Submitted</span>
      </div>

      <div class="timeline-connector"></div>

      <div class="timeline-step pending">
        <div class="ts-dot">2</div>
        <span class="ts-label">Under Review</span>
      </div>

      <div class="timeline-connector"></div>

      <div class="timeline-step pending">
        <div class="ts-dot">3</div>
        <span class="ts-label">Approved</span>
      </div>

      <div class="timeline-connector"></div>

      <div class="timeline-step pending">
        <div class="ts-dot">4</div>
        <span class="ts-label">Active</span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ Detail Cards ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <div class="success-details-grid">

    <!-- VAT Authority -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill"></i>
        <span>VAT Authority</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">VAT Zone</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="zone-pill">{{ registration.vatZone }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">VAT Circle</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="circle-pill">{{ registration.vatCircle }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="registration.district">
          <span class="detail-label">District</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ registration.district }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="registration.division">
          <span class="detail-label">Division</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ registration.division }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="registration.ownerName">
          <span class="detail-label">Owner</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ registration.ownerName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="registration.phone">
          <span class="detail-label">Phone</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ registration.phone }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Classification & Dates -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar3-range"></i>
        <span>Classification &amp; Dates</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">VAT Category</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getCategoryClass(registration.vatCategory)">
              {{ registration.vatCategory }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Registration Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ registration.registrationDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="registration.effectiveDate">
          <span class="detail-label">Effective Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ registration.effectiveDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="registration.expiryDate">
          <span class="detail-label">Expiry Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ registration.expiryDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Annual Turnover</span>
          <span class="detail-value" style="color:var(--color-teal);font-weight:700">
            {{ formatCurrency(registration.annualTurnover) }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="registration.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value" style="font-weight:400;color:var(--color-text-secondary)">
            {{ registration.remarks }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /success-details-grid -->

  <!-- ══ CTA Actions ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <div class="success-actions">
    <button type="button" class="btn-register-another" (click)="registerAnother()">
      <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Register Another VAT
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="btn-view-registration" (click)="goToView()">
      View Full Registration <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/services/vat-registration.service.ts
```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClient, HttpErrorResponse } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Observable, of, throwError } from 'rxjs';
import { catchError } from 'rxjs/operators';
⋮----
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '../../../core/constants/api.constants';
import { ToastService } from '../../../shared/toast/toast.service';
import {
  VatRegistration,
  VatRegistrationCreateRequest,
} from '../../../models/vat-registration.model';
⋮----
export class VatRegistrationService
⋮----
constructor(
⋮----
// ── Mock data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
/**
   * Returned by READ operations when the backend is unreachable (HTTP status 0).
   * Lets officers continue reviewing data during planned maintenance or network
   * outages. WRITE operations never use mock data — they always propagate errors.
   */
⋮----
// ── Read: all ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
/**
   * Fetches all non-deleted VAT registrations.
   *
   * Offline strategy: if the request fails due to a network error (status 0),
   * the mock dataset is returned so the list page remains usable.
   * Server errors (4xx / 5xx) are re-thrown — the ErrorInterceptor handles them.
   */
getAll(): Observable<VatRegistration[]>
⋮----
// ── Read: by ID ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
/**
   * Fetches a single VAT registration by ID.
   *
   * Offline strategy: if the request fails due to a network error, the matching
   * mock record is returned. If no mock record exists for the given ID the error
   * is re-thrown so the component can redirect to the list.
   */
getById(id: number): Observable<VatRegistration>
⋮----
// ── Write: create ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
/**
   * Submits a new VAT registration.
   * Errors are always propagated — writing mock data for a creation is unsafe.
   */
create(payload: VatRegistrationCreateRequest): Observable<VatRegistration>
⋮----
// No catchError: let ErrorInterceptor surface 400 / 409 to the officer.
⋮----
// ── Write: update ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
/**
   * Updates an existing VAT registration.
   * Errors are always propagated.
   */
update(id: number, data: Partial<VatRegistration>): Observable<VatRegistration>
⋮----
// ── Write: delete (soft) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
/**
   * Soft-deletes a VAT registration.
   * Errors are always propagated.
   */
remove(id: number): Observable<void>
⋮----
// ── Private helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
/**
   * Shared offline handler for READ operations.
   *
   * status === 0  → network failure, backend offline.
   *                 Return the fallback data and show a single warning toast.
   * status !== 0  → backend returned an error response (4xx/5xx).
   *                 Re-throw so ErrorInterceptor surfaces it as a user toast.
   */
private handleReadError<T>(
    err: HttpErrorResponse,
    fallback: T,
): Observable<T>
```

```css
/* Scoped styles for VatRegistrationPickerComponent.
   Global form-card chrome (section-header, section-icon, input-wrap, etc.)
   is inherited from the shared stylesheet — only picker-specific rules live here. */
⋮----
.picker-section {
⋮----
padding: 0; /* inherits parent form-section padding */
⋮----
/* ── Search row ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-returns/components/vat-registration-picker/vat-registration-picker.component.html
```html
<!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     STATE A: Nothing selected yet  →  show search bar + results / no-result note
     STATE B: A registration is selected  →  show only the selected card + Change btn
     ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

<div class="picker-section">

  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-icon search-icon">
      <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
    </div>
    <div>
      <h6 class="section-title">Find VAT Registration</h6>
      <span class="section-sub">
        Search by BIN number, TIN or business name — only Active registrations shown
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── STATE A: Search UI ── -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="!isSelected">

    <div class="search-row">
      <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-hash input-icon"></i>
        <input
          type="text"
          class="form-input"
          placeholder="Enter BIN number, TIN or business name..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
          [ngModelOptions]="{ standalone: true }"
          (ngModelChange)="onSearchInput()"
          (keyup.enter)="search()" />
      </div>

      <button type="button" class="btn-search"
        (click)="search()"
        [disabled]="isSearching">
        <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
        <span *ngIf="isSearching">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Searching...
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Results list -->
    <div class="search-results" *ngIf="searchResults.length > 0">
      <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let r of searchResults" (click)="select(r)">
        <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
        <div class="result-info">
          <span class="result-name">{{ r.businessName }}</span>
          <span class="result-meta">
            <span class="fw-bold text-blue me-2">BIN: {{ r.binNo }}</span>
            <span class="me-2">TIN: {{ r.tinNumber }}</span>
            <span class="cat-pill">{{ r.vatCategory }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <span class="result-badge">Select</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- No-result note -->
    <div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="hasSearched && searchResults.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>
      No active VAT registration found. Check BIN, TIN or name and try again.
    </div>

  </ng-container>

  <!-- ── STATE B: Selected card ── -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="isSelected && selectedReg">

    <div class="selected-card">
      <div class="selected-card-left">
        <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
        <div>
          <p class="selected-name">{{ selectedReg.businessName }}</p>
          <p class="selected-meta">
            BIN: {{ selectedReg.binNo }}
            <span class="ms-2">TIN: {{ selectedReg.tinNumber }}</span>
            <span class="ms-2 cat-pill">{{ selectedReg.vatCategory }}</span>
            <span class="ms-2 zone-pill">{{ selectedReg.vatZone }}</span>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="selected-card-right">
        <div class="autofill-tag">
          <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Selected
        </div>
        <button type="button" class="btn-change" (click)="clear()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i> Change
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

  </ng-container>

</div>
```

```typescript
import {
  Component,
  EventEmitter,
  OnDestroy,
  OnInit,
  Output,
} from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
import { finalize, takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';
⋮----
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '../../../../core/constants/api.constants';
import { VatRegistration } from '../../../../models/vat-registration.model';
import { ToastService } from '../../../../shared/toast/toast.service';
⋮----
/**
 * VatRegistrationPickerComponent
 *
 * Responsibilities (only):
 *  - Accept a query string, call the API, filter to Active-only results
 *  - Show results list OR a "selected card + Change button" — never both
 *  - Emit `registrationSelected` when the user picks a record
 *  - Emit `registrationCleared` when the user clicks "Change"
 *
 * The parent (VatReturnCreateComponent) is responsible for patching
 * vatRegistrationId into its own form and storing selectedReg locally.
 */
⋮----
export class VatRegistrationPickerComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy
⋮----
/** Fires once when the user clicks a result row. */
⋮----
/** Fires when the user hits the "Change" button on the selected card. */
⋮----
// ── Search state ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
// ── Selection state ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
/** Set internally after emission so the card renders correctly. */
⋮----
constructor(
⋮----
ngOnInit(): void
⋮----
ngOnDestroy(): void
⋮----
// ── Computed helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
get isSelected(): boolean
⋮----
// ── Search ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
onSearchInput(): void
⋮----
search(): void
⋮----
// Only Active registrations can file returns
⋮----
// ── Selection ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
select(reg: VatRegistration): void
⋮----
this.searchResults = [];    // hide the list immediately
⋮----
clear(): void
```

## File: src/app/layout/breadcrumbs/breadcrumbs.component.html
```html
<div class="breadcrumb-bar">
  <div class="breadcrumb-left">

    <div class="page-title-row">
      <div class="page-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-grid-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <h5 class="page-title">{{ pageTitle }}</h5>
    </div>

    <div class="breadcrumb-pills">
      <ng-container *ngFor="let crumb of breadcrumbs; let last = last">

        <a
          *ngIf="!last"
          [routerLink]="crumb.url"
          class="crumb-pill"
        >
          <i class="bi bi-house-fill" *ngIf="crumb.label === 'Home'"></i>
          <span>{{ crumb.label }}</span>
        </a>

        <span *ngIf="!last" class="crumb-separator">
          <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
        </span>

        <span *ngIf="last" class="crumb-pill active">
          {{ crumb.label }}
        </span>

      </ng-container>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="breadcrumb-right">
    <span class="fiscal-badge">
      <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i>
      FY 2025–2026
    </span>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/layout/main-layout/main-layout.component.html
```html
<div class="app-layout" [class.sidebar-collapsed]="isSidebarCollapsed">

  <!-- Mobile Overlay -->
  <div
    class="sidebar-overlay"
    [class.active]="isMobileDrawerOpen"
    (click)="closeDrawer()"
  ></div>

  <!-- Sidebar -->
  <div
    class="sidebar-wrapper"
    [class.collapsed]="isSidebarCollapsed"
    [class.mobile-open]="isMobileDrawerOpen"
  >
    <app-sidebar
      [isCollapsed]="isSidebarCollapsed"
      (closeSidebar)="closeDrawer()"
    ></app-sidebar>
  </div>

  <!-- Main Area -->
  <div class="main-area">
    <app-topbar (menuToggle)="toggleSidebar()"></app-topbar>
    <app-breadcrumbs></app-breadcrumbs>
    <div class="page-content">
      <router-outlet></router-outlet>
    </div>
    <app-footer></app-footer>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/layout/topbar/topbar.component.html
```html
<div class="topbar" [class.search-active]="isSearchOpen">

  <!-- Left -->
  <div class="topbar-left" [class.hidden-on-mobile-search]="isSearchOpen">
    <button class="hamburger-btn" (click)="menuToggle.emit()" title="Toggle Sidebar">
      <i class="bi bi-list"></i>
    </button>

    <div class="topbar-title">
      <span class="title-main">National VAT & Tax Management System</span>
      <span class="title-date">{{ currentDate }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Center: Desktop Search -->
  <div class="search-box desktop-search">
    <i class="bi bi-search search-icon"></i>
    <input
      type="text"
      placeholder="Search taxpayer, TIN, BIN..."
      class="search-input"
    />
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Search Expanded -->
  <div class="mobile-search-bar" *ngIf="isSearchOpen">
    <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
    <input
      #mobileSearchInput
      type="text"
      placeholder="Search taxpayer, TIN, BIN..."
      class="mobile-search-input"
    />
    <button type="button" class="close-search-btn" (click)="closeSearch()">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Right -->
  <div class="topbar-right" [class.hidden]="isSearchOpen">

    <!-- Mobile Search Toggle -->
    <button class="icon-btn mobile-search-toggle" (click)="openSearch()">
      <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
    </button>

    <!-- Notifications -->
    <div class="topbar-action" (click)="toggleNotifDropdown()">
      <button class="icon-btn" [class.active]="isNotifDropdownOpen">
        <i class="bi bi-bell-fill"></i>
        <span class="badge-dot" *ngIf="unreadCount > 0">{{ unreadCount }}</span>
      </button>

      <div class="dropdown-panel notif-panel" *ngIf="isNotifDropdownOpen">
        <div class="dropdown-header">
          <span>Notifications</span>
          <span class="badge-count">{{ unreadCount }} New</span>
        </div>

        <div class="notif-list">
          <div
            class="notif-item"
            *ngFor="let notif of notifications"
            [class.unread]="notif.unread"
          >
            <div class="notif-icon-wrap">
              <i [class]="notif.icon"></i>
            </div>
            <div class="notif-body">
              <p class="notif-text">{{ notif.text }}</p>
              <span class="notif-time">{{ notif.time }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dropdown-footer">
          <a href="#">View all notifications</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="topbar-divider"></div>

    <!-- User -->
    <div class="topbar-action" (click)="toggleUserDropdown()">
      <button class="user-btn" [class.active]="isUserDropdownOpen">
        <div class="user-avatar">{{ userInitial }}</div>
        <div class="user-info">
          <span class="user-name">{{ currentUser?.fullName }}</span>
          <span class="user-role">{{ currentUser?.role | titlecase }}</span>
        </div>
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-down user-chevron" [class.rotated]="isUserDropdownOpen"></i>
      </button>

      <div class="dropdown-panel user-panel" *ngIf="isUserDropdownOpen">
        <div class="dropdown-header user-header">
          <div class="user-avatar lg">{{ userInitial }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="fw-bold">{{ currentUser?.fullName }}</div>
            <small class="text-muted">{{ currentUser?.email }}</small>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dropdown-menu-list">
          <a class="dropdown-menu-item" routerLink="/profile">
            <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i> My Profile
          </a>
          <a class="dropdown-menu-item" routerLink="/settings">
            <i class="bi bi-gear-fill"></i> Settings
          </a>
          <a class="dropdown-menu-item" routerLink="/activity-logs">
            <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i> Activity Log
          </a>
          <div class="dropdown-divider"></div>
          <a class="dropdown-menu-item logout" (click)="logout()">
            <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-right"></i> Sign Out
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

```typescript
export interface DashboardStats {
  // Common
  totalTaxpayers: number;
  totalBusinesses: number;
  totalVatReturns: number;
  totalPayments: number;
  totalRevenue: number;
  pendingAudits: number;
  pendingRefunds: number;
  issuedPenalties: number;
  taxpayerGrowth: number;
  revenueGrowth: number;
  vatReturnGrowth: number;
  paymentGrowth: number;

  // Auditor specific
  totalAudits: number;
  completedAudits: number;
  flaggedCases: number;
  auditGrowth: number;

  // Data Entry Operator specific
  todayEntries: number;
  pendingTasks: number;
  taxpayersAddedThisMonth: number;

  // Taxpayer specific
  myVatReturns: number;
  myPayments: number;
  myPendingNotices: number;
  myRefundStatus: number;
  myTotalPaid: number;
}

export interface RecentAudit {
  id: number;
  auditNo: string;
  taxpayerName: string;
  auditType: string;
  assignedDate: string;
  status: 'Pending' | 'In Progress' | 'Completed' | 'Flagged';
}
⋮----
export interface RecentEntry {
  id: number;
  entryType: string;
  description: string;
  enteredAt: string;
  status: 'Saved' | 'Pending' | 'Approved';
}
⋮----
export interface MyNotice {
  id: number;
  noticeNo: string;
  subject: string;
  issuedDate: string;
  dueDate: string;
  status: 'Unread' | 'Read' | 'Responded';
}
⋮----
export interface MyReturn {
  id: number;
  returnNo: string;
  period: string;
  submittedDate: string;
  amount: number;
  status: 'Submitted' | 'Approved' | 'Rejected' | 'Pending';
}
⋮----
export interface ChartDataPoint {
  label: string;
  value: number;
}
⋮----
export interface DashboardChartData {
  vatChart:     ChartDataPoint[];
  paymentChart: ChartDataPoint[];
  auditChart:   ChartDataPoint[];
  myPaymentChart: ChartDataPoint[];
}
```

```typescript
export interface Toast {

  type:     ToastType;
  title:    string;
  message:  string;
  duration: number;
}

export class ToastService

error  (message: string, title = 'Error'):   void
```

```css
/* ============================================================
   NVTMS — National VAT & Tax Management System
   Global Stylesheet
   
   Structure:
   01. Design Tokens (CSS Custom Properties)
   02. Base & Reset
   03. Layout Shells
   04. Section Anatomy (form-section, section-header, section-icon)
   05. Form Grid & Groups
   06. Form Labels & Hints
   07. Form Controls (input-wrap, form-input, select, textarea)

   09. Buttons
   10. Status Badges
   11. VAT Category Badges
   12. Code / BIN / Pill Display
   13. Data Table (Desktop)
   14. Mobile Cards
   15. List Page Search Bar
   16. View Page Anatomy (view-header-card, details-grid)
   17. Edit Banner
   18. Loading & Empty States
   19. Modal
   20. FAB Button
   21. Responsive Breakpoints
   ============================================================ */
```

## File: src/assets/css/styles-form.css
```css
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   NIRAPOD — GLOBAL FORM STYLES
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
⋮----
/* ── Alerts ── */
.alert-success {
.alert-error {
⋮----
/* ── Back Button (unified blue) ── */
.btn-back {
.btn-back:hover { background: #f0f4ff; }
⋮----
/* ── Form Card ── */
.form-card {
⋮----
/* ── Form Section ── */
.form-section { padding: 24px 28px; }
⋮----
.section-header {
⋮----
/* Section Icon — default blue, override with modifier */
.section-icon {
/* semantic icon modifiers — use only where meaning matters */
.section-icon.green  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1faa8b, #17c69a); }
.section-icon.amber  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b, #f97316); }
.section-icon.red    { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e74c3c, #c0392b); }
.section-icon.cyan   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0891b2, #06b6d4); }
⋮----
.section-title { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
.section-sub   { font-size: 12px; color: #999; }
⋮----
.section-divider { height: 1px; background: #f0f4f8; margin: 0 28px; }
⋮----
/* ── Form Grid ── */
.form-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 18px; }
.form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
.form-group.full-width { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
⋮----
/* ── Labels ── */
.form-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #444; }
.form-label.required::after { content: ' *'; color: #e74c3c; }
.optional    { font-size: 11px; color: #aaa; font-weight: 400; }
.field-hint  { font-size: 11px; color: #888; margin-top: 4px; }
.auto-label  {
⋮----
/* ── Input Wrap ── */
.input-wrap { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; }
.input-icon {
.textarea-icon { top: 12px; align-self: flex-start; }
⋮----
/* ── Form Input (focus = blue always) ── */
.form-input {
.form-input:focus {
.form-input:disabled { background: #f5f5f5; cursor: not-allowed; }
.form-input.is-invalid { border-color: #e74c3c; }
⋮----
.form-select   { appearance: none; cursor: pointer; }
.form-textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 80px; padding-top: 10px; }
⋮----
/* Computed/Auto fields */
.auto-field  { background: #f0f4f8 !important; color: #555 !important; cursor: not-allowed; border-color: #e0e8f0 !important; }
.calc-field  { background: #f0f4f8 !important; color: #555 !important; cursor: not-allowed; border-color: #e0e8f0 !important; }
⋮----
/* Error messages */
.field-error-msg { font-size: 11.5px; color: #e74c3c; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 2px; display: block; }
.password-error  { font-size: 12px; color: #e74c3c; font-weight: 600; }
⋮----
/* ── Form Actions ── */
.form-actions {
.btn-cancel {
.btn-cancel:hover { background: #f5f7fb; }
⋮----
.btn-reset {
.btn-reset:hover { background: #fde8c0; }
⋮----
/* btn-submit: default blue — module can override with .btn-submit.danger etc */
.btn-submit {
.btn-submit:hover:not(:disabled) {
.btn-submit:disabled,
⋮----
/* ── Taxpayer Search (shared — used in TIN, Business, VAT Return, ITR, Payment) ── */
.search-row         { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; }
.search-input-wrap  { flex: 1; }
⋮----
.btn-search {
.btn-search:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
⋮----
.search-results {
.result-item {
.result-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.result-item:hover      { background: #f0f4ff; }
⋮----
.result-avatar {
.result-info { flex: 1; }
.result-name { font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a2340; display: block; }
.result-meta { font-size: 12px; color: #888; display: block; margin-top: 2px; }
.result-badge {
⋮----
.no-result-note {
⋮----
/* ── Selected Taxpayer Card (green — confirms selection) ── */
.selected-card {
.selected-card-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
.selected-avatar {
.selected-name { margin: 0; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 700; color: #14532d; }
.selected-meta { margin: 2px 0 0; font-size: 12px; color: #16a34a; }
.autofill-tag {
⋮----
/* Locked auto-filled fields */
.input-wrap.locked .form-input {
.lock-icon {
⋮----
/* Clear button */
.clear-btn {
.clear-btn:hover { color: #e74c3c; }
⋮----
/* ── Status Preview ── */
.status-preview {
.status-hint { font-size: 12px; color: #888; font-style: italic; }
⋮----
/* ── Toggle Switch ── */
.toggle-section {
.toggle-info  { flex: 1; }
.ti-title     { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.ti-desc      { font-size: 12px; color: #888; line-height: 1.5; }
.toggle-wrap  { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.toggle-switch { position: relative; display: inline-block; width: 52px; height: 28px; }
.toggle-switch input { opacity: 0; width: 0; height: 0; }
.toggle-slider {
.toggle-slider::before {
input:checked + .toggle-slider { background: #1a3f8f; }
input:checked + .toggle-slider::before { transform: translateX(24px); }
.toggle-label    { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #888; }
.toggle-label.on { color: #1a3f8f; }
⋮----
/* ── Responsive ── */
⋮----
.form-section    { padding: 18px 16px; }
.section-divider { margin: 0 16px; }
.form-grid       { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.form-actions    { padding: 16px; justify-content: stretch; }
.btn-cancel, .btn-reset, .btn-submit { flex: 1; justify-content: center; }
.search-row      { flex-direction: column; }
.btn-search      { width: 100%; justify-content: center; }
.selected-card   { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; }
.toggle-section  { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
⋮----
.form-actions { flex-direction: column; }
.btn-cancel, .btn-reset, .btn-submit { width: 100%; }
```

```typescript
/**
 * This file includes polyfills needed by Angular and is loaded before the app.
 * You can add your own extra polyfills to this file.
 *
 * This file is divided into 2 sections:
 *   1. Browser polyfills. These are applied before loading ZoneJS and are sorted by browsers.
 *   2. Application imports. Files imported after ZoneJS that should be loaded before your main
 *      file.
 *
 * The current setup is for so-called "evergreen" browsers; the last versions of browsers that
 * automatically update themselves. This includes recent versions of Safari, Chrome (including
 * Opera), Edge on the desktop, and iOS and Chrome on mobile.
 *
 * Learn more in https://angular.io/guide/browser-support
 */
⋮----
/***************************************************************************************************
 * BROWSER POLYFILLS
 */
⋮----
/**
 * By default, zone.js will patch all possible macroTask and DomEvents
 * user can disable parts of macroTask/DomEvents patch by setting following flags
 * because those flags need to be set before `zone.js` being loaded, and webpack
 * will put import in the top of bundle, so user need to create a separate file
 * in this directory (for example: zone-flags.ts), and put the following flags
 * into that file, and then add the following code before importing zone.js.
 * import './zone-flags';
 *
 * The flags allowed in zone-flags.ts are listed here.
 *
 * The following flags will work for all browsers.
 *
 * (window as any).__Zone_disable_requestAnimationFrame = true; // disable patch requestAnimationFrame
 * (window as any).__Zone_disable_on_property = true; // disable patch onProperty such as onclick
 * (window as any).__zone_symbol__UNPATCHED_EVENTS = ['scroll', 'mousemove']; // disable patch specified eventNames
 *
 *  in IE/Edge developer tools, the addEventListener will also be wrapped by zone.js
 *  with the following flag, it will bypass `zone.js` patch for IE/Edge
 *
 *  (window as any).__Zone_enable_cross_context_check = true;
 *
 */
⋮----
/***************************************************************************************************
 * Zone JS is required by default for Angular itself.
 */
import 'zone.js';  // Included with Angular CLI.
⋮----
/***************************************************************************************************
 * APPLICATION IMPORTS
 */
```

## File: src/app/features/activity-logs/pages/activity-logs-list/activity-logs-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Activity Logs</h4>
    <p>Complete audit trail of all system activities.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-export-log" (click)="exportLogs()">
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Export Logs
  </button>
</div>

<!-- Stats Row -->
<div class="log-stats">
  <div class="ls-card">
    <div class="lsc-icon all"><i class="bi bi-list-check"></i></div>
    <div><span class="lsc-label">Total Actions</span><span class="lsc-value">{{ logs.length }}</span></div>
  </div>
  <div class="ls-card">
    <div class="lsc-icon success"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i></div>
    <div><span class="lsc-label">Successful</span>
    <span class="lsc-value">{{ countByStatus('Success') }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="ls-card">
    <div class="lsc-icon failed"><i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i></div>
    <div><span class="lsc-label">Failed</span><span class="lsc-value">{{ countByStatus('Failed') }}</span></div>
  </div>
  <div class="ls-card">
    <div class="lsc-icon warning"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i></div>
    <div><span class="lsc-label">Warnings</span><span class="lsc-value">{{ countByStatus('Warning') }}</span></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="log-filters">
      <div class="search-field" style="flex:1">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search action, user, module, description..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <select class="filter-select" [(ngModel)]="filterType">
        <option value="">All Actions</option>
        <option *ngFor="let t of actionTypes.slice(1)" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading activity logs...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Logs Timeline -->
  <div class="logs-timeline" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="log-item" *ngFor="let log of filtered">
      <div class="log-icon" [ngClass]="getActionClass(log.actionType)">
        <i [class]="getActionIcon(log.actionType)"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="log-body">
        <div class="log-header">
          <div class="log-action">{{ log.action }}</div>
          <div class="log-time">{{ log.timestamp }}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="log-desc">{{ log.description }}</div>
        <div class="log-meta">
          <span class="log-user"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ log.performedBy }}</span>
          <span class="log-role">{{ log.userRole }}</span>
          <span class="log-module"><i class="bi bi-grid-fill"></i> {{ log.module }}</span>
          <span class="log-ip"><i class="bi bi-router-fill"></i> {{ log.ipAddress }}</span>
          <span class="log-status status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(log.status)">{{ log.status }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="log-type-badge" [ngClass]="getActionClass(log.actionType)">
        {{ log.actionType }}
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i><p>No activity logs found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/audit-management/pages/audit-list/audit-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Audit Management</h4>
    <p>Manage all tax audits and investigations.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/audits/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Create Audit
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search by audit no, TIN, taxpayer, type, assigned to..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm"
        />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
        <span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading audits...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Audit No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th>Priority</th>
          <th>Year</th>
          <th>Scheduled</th>
          <th>Assigned To</th>
          <th>Tax Demand</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let a of filteredAudits; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td><span class="audit-code">{{ a.auditNo }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ a.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ a.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ a.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(a.auditType)">
              {{ a.auditType }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="pri-badge" [ngClass]="getPriorityClass(a.priority)">
              {{ a.priority }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>{{ a.assessmentYear }}</td>
          <td>{{ a.scheduledDate }}</td>
          <td>{{ a.assignedTo }}</td>

          <td class="amount-cell">{{ formatCurrency(a.taxDemand) }}</td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(a.status)">
              {{ a.status }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewAudit(a.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit"
                (click)="editAudit(a.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button
                *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete"
                (click)="confirmDelete(a.id)"
              >
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredAudits.length === 0">
          <td colspan="11">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i>
              <p>No audits found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding: 12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let a of filteredAudits">

      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ a.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ a.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ a.auditNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(a.status)">
          {{ a.status }}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>TIN</label>
          <span>{{ a.tinNumber }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Type</label>
          <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(a.auditType)">
            {{ a.auditType }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Priority</label>
          <span class="pri-badge" [ngClass]="getPriorityClass(a.priority)">
            {{ a.priority }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Year</label>
          <span>{{ a.assessmentYear }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Scheduled</label>
          <span>{{ a.scheduledDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Assigned To</label>
          <span>{{ a.assignedTo }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Tax Demand</label>
          <span class="amount-cell">{{ formatCurrency(a.taxDemand) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="a.remarks">
          <label>Remarks</label>
          <span>{{ a.remarks }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewAudit(a.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="editAudit(a.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
        </button>
        <button
          *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete"
          (click)="confirmDelete(a.id)"
        >
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
        </button>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredAudits.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i>
      <p>No audits found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- FAB -->
<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn"
  routerLink="/audits/create" title="Create Audit">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>


<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Business?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this business record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/fiscal-years/pages/fiscal-year-create/fiscal-year-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Add Fiscal Year</h4>
    <p>Define a new fiscal year with tax deadlines.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Section 1: Year Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Fiscal Year Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Year name — dates auto-fill from name</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Year Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. 2025-26"
            [(ngModel)]="form.yearName"
            (ngModelChange)="onYearNameChange()" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-hint">Format: YYYY-YY (e.g. 2025-26) — dates auto-fill</span>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Start Date <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.startDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">End Date <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.endDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Year Preview Card -->
    <div class="year-preview" *ngIf="form.yearName">
      <div class="yp-year">FY {{ form.yearName }}</div>
      <div class="yp-range" *ngIf="form.startDate && form.endDate">
        {{ form.startDate }} → {{ form.endDate }}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Tax Deadlines -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-alarm-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Deadlines</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">VAT and income tax due dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">VAT Due Day (Monthly)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.vatDueDay">
            <option *ngFor="let d of vatDueDays" [value]="d">{{ d }}th of each month</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Income Tax Due Date <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-event input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incomeTaxDueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Deadline Preview -->
    <div class="deadline-preview" *ngIf="form.vatDueDay || form.incomeTaxDueDate">
      <div class="dp-item" *ngIf="form.vatDueDay">
        <div class="dp-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
        <div>
          <div class="dp-label">VAT Returns Due</div>
          <div class="dp-value">{{ form.vatDueDay }}th of each month</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="dp-item" *ngIf="form.incomeTaxDueDate">
        <div class="dp-icon it"><i class="bi bi-calendar-event-fill"></i></div>
        <div>
          <div class="dp-label">Income Tax Return Due</div>
          <div class="dp-value">{{ form.incomeTaxDueDate }}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Current Year Toggle -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-star-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Current Year Setting</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Set as the active fiscal year for the system</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="toggle-section">
      <div class="toggle-info">
        <div class="ti-title">Set as Current Year</div>
        <div class="ti-desc">Enabling this will mark this as the active fiscal year. The previous current year will be automatically closed.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="toggle-wrap">
        <label class="toggle-switch">
          <input type="checkbox" [(ngModel)]="form.isCurrentYear" />
          <span class="toggle-slider"></span>
        </label>
        <span class="toggle-label" [class.on]="form.isCurrentYear">
          {{ form.isCurrentYear ? 'Yes — Current Year' : 'No' }}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i> Create Fiscal Year</span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Creating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```
