## File: src/app/features/import-duty/pages/import-duty-view/import-duty-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Import Duty Details</h4>
    <p>Full import duty assessment information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back</button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading"><div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div></div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && record">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="imp-header-card">
    <div class="ihc-left">
      <div class="ihc-icon"><i class="bi bi-truck-front-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="ihc-ref">{{ record.dutyRef }}</div>
        <div class="ihc-business">{{ record.businessName }}</div>
        <div class="ihc-meta">
          <span class="ihc-product">{{ record.productName }}</span>
          <span class="ihc-hs">{{ record.hsCode }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(record.status)">{{ record.status }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ihc-right">
      <div class="ihc-stat">
        <span class="ihs-label">Total Payable</span>
        <span class="ihs-value">{{ fmt(record.totalPayable) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ihc-stat">
        <span class="ihs-label">CD Rate</span>
        <span class="ihs-rate">{{ record.cdRate || 0 }}%</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Amount Summary -->
  <div class="imp-amount-row">
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon cif"><i class="bi bi-currency-dollar"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">CIF Value</span><span class="iac-value">{{ fmt(record.cifValue) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon duty"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">Customs Duty (CD)</span><span class="iac-value duty">{{ fmt(record.customsDuty) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">Supplementary Duty (SD)</span><span class="iac-value vat">{{ fmt(record.supplementaryDuty) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">VAT</span><span class="iac-value vat">{{ fmt(record.vat) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon duty"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">AIT</span><span class="iac-value duty">{{ fmt(record.advanceIncomeTax) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">AT</span><span class="iac-value vat">{{ fmt(record.advanceTax) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card highlight">
      <div class="iac-icon total"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">Total Payable</span><span class="iac-value total">{{ fmt(record.totalPayable) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon paid"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">Paid</span><span class="iac-value paid">{{ record.paidAmount > 0 ? fmt(record.paidAmount) : '—' }}</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i><span>Importer Information</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">TIN</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ record.tinNumber }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Taxpayer</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ record.taxpayerName }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Business</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.businessName }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i><span>Goods Information</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Product</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ record.productName }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">HS Code</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ record.hsCode }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Description</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.goodsDescription }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Origin Country</span><span class="detail-value">🌐 {{ record.originCountry }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i><span>Shipping & Port</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Port of Entry</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ record.portOfEntry }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Bill of Entry Number</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ record.boeNumber }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Bill of Entry Date</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.boeDate }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Bill of Lading</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ record.billOfLading }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Import Date</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.importDate }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="record.assessmentDate"><span class="detail-label">Assessment Date</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.assessmentDate }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i><span>Status & Remarks</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Status</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(record.status)">{{ record.status }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="record.remarks"><span class="detail-label">Remarks</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.remarks }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/notices-notifications/pages/notice-create/notice-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Send Notice</h4>
    <p>Create and send a new notice or notification.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Section 1: Notice Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-bell-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Notice Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Type, priority and target audience</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Notice Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.noticeType">
            <option value="">Select Type</option>
            <option *ngFor="let t of noticeTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Priority</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-speedometer2 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.priority">
            <option *ngFor="let p of priorities" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Target Audience</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-people-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.targetType">
            <option *ngFor="let t of targetTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Issued By</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-badge input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.issuedBy">
            <option value="">Select Officer</option>
            <option *ngFor="let o of officers" [value]="o">{{ o }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Issue Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.issuedDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Due Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.dueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Taxpayer (conditional on Specific Taxpayer) -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="showTaxpayerFields">
  <!-- Taxpayer Search (replaces raw tinNumber/taxpayerName inputs) -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Search and select the taxpayer</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Find Taxpayer</label>
        <div class="search-row">
          <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-search input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input"
              placeholder="Enter NID, name or TIN..."
              [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
              [disabled]="selectedTaxpayer !== null"
              (keyup.enter)="searchTaxpayer()" />
            <button *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer" class="clear-btn" (click)="clearTaxpayer()">
              <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-search" (click)="searchTaxpayer()"
            [disabled]="isSearching || selectedTaxpayer !== null">
            <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
            <span *ngIf="isSearching"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span></span>
          </button>
        </div>
        <!-- Results -->
        <div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
          <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let t of searchResults" (click)="selectTaxpayer(t)">
            <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
            <div class="result-info">
              <span class="result-name">{{ getDisplayName(t) }}</span>
              <span class="result-meta">
                <span *ngIf="t.nid">NID: {{ t.nid }}</span>
                <span *ngIf="t.phone"> · {{ t.phone }}</span>
              </span>
            </div>
            <span class="result-badge">Select</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Selected -->
        <div class="selected-card" *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer">
          <div class="selected-card-left">
            <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i></div>
            <div>
              <p class="selected-name">{{ getDisplayName(selectedTaxpayer) }}</p>
              <p class="selected-meta">
                <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.nid">NID: {{ selectedTaxpayer.nid }}</span>
                <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber"> · TIN: {{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="autofill-tag"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Selected</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>


    <div class="section-divider"></div>
  </ng-container>

  <!-- Section 3: Message -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Notice Message</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Subject and full message body</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Subject</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-chat-left-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Enter notice subject"
            [(ngModel)]="form.subject" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Message Body</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-text-paragraph input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Enter the full notice message..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.body" rows="6"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Attachment Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-paperclip input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. notice_document.pdf"
            [(ngModel)]="form.attachmentName" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i> Send Notice
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Sending...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/notices-notifications/pages/notice-list/notice-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>
      Notices & Notifications
      <span class="unread-badge" *ngIf="unreadCount > 0">
        {{ unreadCount }} Unread
      </span>
    </h4>
    <p>Manage all notices, alerts and notifications.</p>
  </div>
  
  <a  *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER', 'TAX_OFFICER']"
    routerLink="/notices/create"
    class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn"
  >
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Send Notice
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Filter Tabs -->
  <div class="filter-tabs">
    <button
      *ngFor="let f of filters"
      class="filter-tab"
      [class.active]="activeFilter === f"
      (click)="activeFilter = f"
    >
      {{ f }}
      <span class="tab-count" *ngIf="f === 'Unread' && unreadCount > 0">
        {{ unreadCount }}
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search by notice no, subject, taxpayer, type..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm"
        />
      </div>
      <button
        *canDo="'export'"
        class="btn-export"
      >
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
        <span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading notices...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Notice Cards — Desktop & Mobile same design -->
  <div class="notice-list" *ngIf="!isLoading">

    <div
      class="notice-card"
      *ngFor="let n of filteredNotices"
      [class.unread]="n.status === 'Unread'"
      (click)="viewNotice(n.id)"
    >
      <!-- Left Icon -->
      <div class="notice-icon" [ngClass]="getTypeColor(n.noticeType)">
        <i [class]="getTypeIcon(n.noticeType)"></i>
      </div>

      <!-- Content -->
      <div class="notice-content">
        <div class="notice-header-row">
          <div class="notice-title-group">
            <span class="notice-no">{{ n.noticeNo }}</span>
            <span class="notice-subject"
              [class.fw-bold]="n.status === 'Unread'">
              {{ n.subject }}
            </span>
          </div>
          <div class="notice-badges">
            <span class="pri-badge" [ngClass]="getPriorityClass(n.priority)">
              {{ n.priority }}
            </span>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(n.status)">
              {{ n.status }}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <p class="notice-body">{{ n.body }}</p>

        <div class="notice-footer-row">
          <div class="notice-meta">
            <span class="meta-item">
              <i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ n.issuedBy }}
            </span>
            <span class="meta-item">
              <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> {{ n.issuedDate }}
            </span>
            <span class="meta-item" *ngIf="n.dueDate">
              <i class="bi bi-calendar-x"></i> Due: {{ n.dueDate }}
            </span>
            <span class="meta-item" *ngIf="n.attachmentName">
              <i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i> {{ n.attachmentName }}
            </span>
            <span class="meta-item target">
              <i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i> {{ n.targetType }}
            </span>
          </div>

          <div class="notice-actions" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">
            <button class="btn-view-sm" (click)="viewNotice(n.id)">
              <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
            </button>
            <button
              *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
              class="btn-delete-sm"
              (click)="confirmDelete(n.id)"
            >
              <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Unread Dot -->
      <div class="unread-dot" *ngIf="n.status === 'Unread'"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Empty State -->
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredNotices.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-bell-slash"></i>
      <p>No notices found.</p>
    </div>

  </div>

</div>

<!-- FAB -->
<button
  *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER', 'TAX_OFFICER']"
  class="fab-btn"
  routerLink="/notices/create"
  title="Send Notice"
>
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Notice?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this notice?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/pages/penalty-list/penalty-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Penalty & Fines</h4>
    <p>Manage all tax penalties and fines issued by NBR.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/penalties/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Issue Penalty
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search by penalty no, TIN, taxpayer, type..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm"
        />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
        <span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading penalties...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Penalty No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th>Severity</th>
          <th>Penalty</th>
          <th>Interest</th>
          <th>Total</th>
          <th>Issue Date</th>
          <th>Due Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let p of filteredPenalties; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td><span class="penalty-code">{{ p.penaltyNo }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ p.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ p.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ p.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(p.penaltyType)">
              {{ p.penaltyType }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(p.severity)">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
              {{ p.severity }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td class="amount-cell penalty-amount">
            {{ formatCurrency(p.penaltyAmount) }}
          </td>

          <td class="amount-cell interest-amount">
            {{ formatCurrency(p.interestAmount) }}
          </td>

          <td class="amount-cell total-amount">
            {{ formatCurrency(p.totalAmount) }}
          </td>

          <td>{{ p.issueDate }}</td>

          <td>
            <span [class]="p.status === 'Overdue' ? 'due-overdue' : 'due-normal'">
              {{ p.dueDate }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">
              {{ p.status }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewPenalty(p.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit"
                (click)="editPenalty(p.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button
                *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete"
                (click)="confirmDelete(p.id)"
              >
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredPenalties.length === 0">
          <td colspan="12">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i>
              <p>No penalties found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding: 12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let p of filteredPenalties">

      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ p.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ p.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ p.penaltyNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">
          {{ p.status }}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>TIN</label>
          <span>{{ p.tinNumber }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Type</label>
          <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(p.penaltyType)">
            {{ p.penaltyType }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Severity</label>
          <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(p.severity)">
            {{ p.severity }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Penalty</label>
          <span class="penalty-amount">{{ formatCurrency(p.penaltyAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Interest</label>
          <span class="interest-amount">{{ formatCurrency(p.interestAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Total</label>
          <span class="total-amount">{{ formatCurrency(p.totalAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Issue Date</label>
          <span>{{ p.issueDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Due Date</label>
          <span [class]="p.status === 'Overdue' ? 'due-overdue' : ''">
            {{ p.dueDate }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="p.description">
          <label>Description</label>
          <span>{{ p.description }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewPenalty(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit"
          (click)="editPenalty(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
        </button>
        <button
          *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete"
          (click)="confirmDelete(p.id)"
        >
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
        </button>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredPenalties.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i>
      <p>No penalties found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- FAB -->
<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn"
  routerLink="/penalties/create" title="Issue Penalty">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Penalty?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this penalty record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

.due-overdue {

## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/pages/penalty-view/penalty-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Penalty Details</h4>
    <p>Full penalty and fine information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && penalty">

  <!-- Penalty Header Card -->
  <div class="view-header-card red">
    <div class="penalty-header-left">
      <div class="penalty-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="penalty-no">{{ penalty.penaltyNo }}</div>
        <div class="penalty-meta">
          <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(penalty.severity)">
            <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
            {{ penalty.severity }}
          </span>
          <span class="penalty-type-label">{{ penalty.penaltyType }}</span>
          <span class="penalty-date">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> {{ penalty.issueDate }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="penalty-header-right">
      <div class="penalty-label">Total Due</div>
      <div class="penalty-total">{{ fmt(penalty.totalAmount) }}</div>
      <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(penalty.status)">
        {{ penalty.status }}
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Amount Summary -->
  <div class="amount-summary-row">
    <div class="amount-card">
      <div class="ac-icon penalty"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="ac-body">
        <span class="ac-label">Penalty</span>
        <span class="ac-value penalty">{{ fmt(penalty.penaltyAmount) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="amount-card">
      <div class="ac-icon interest"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div class="ac-body">
        <span class="ac-label">Interest (15%)</span>
        <span class="ac-value interest">{{ fmt(penalty.interestAmount) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="amount-card">
      <div class="ac-icon total"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="ac-body">
        <span class="ac-label">Total Due</span>
        <span class="ac-value total">{{ fmt(penalty.totalAmount) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="amount-card">
      <div class="ac-icon paid"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i></div>
      <div class="ac-body">
        <span class="ac-label">Paid</span>
        <span class="ac-value paid">
          {{ penalty.paidAmount > 0 ? fmt(penalty.paidAmount) : '—' }}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
        <span>Taxpayer Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">TIN Number</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ penalty.tinNumber }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Taxpayer Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ penalty.taxpayerName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Assessment Year</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.assessmentYear }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.returnNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Return No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ penalty.returnNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
        <span>Penalty Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Penalty Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ penalty.penaltyType }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Severity</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(penalty.severity)">
              {{ penalty.severity }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Issue Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.issueDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Due Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value" [class]="penalty.status === 'Overdue' ? 'due-overdue' : ''">
            {{ penalty.dueDate }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.paymentDate">
          <span class="detail-label">Payment Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.paymentDate }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-gear"></i>
        <span>Processing Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(penalty.status)">
              {{ penalty.status }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Issued By</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.issuedBy }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.approvedBy">
          <span class="detail-label">Approved By</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.approvedBy }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card" *ngIf="penalty.description || penalty.remarks">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
        <span>Description & Remarks</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.description">
          <span class="detail-label">Description</span>
          <span class="detail-value"
            style="text-align:left; max-width:300px; word-break:break-word; white-space:normal;">
            {{ penalty.description }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value"
            style="text-align:left; max-width:300px; word-break:break-word; white-space:normal;">
            {{ penalty.remarks }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step1-account-type/reg-step-account-type/reg-step-account-type.component.html
```html
<div class="step-body">

  <div class="step-intro">
    <h3 class="step-heading">What type of taxpayer are you?</h3>
    <p class="step-sub">First select a category, then your specific taxpayer type.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="type-loading" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Loading taxpayer types...
  </div>

  <ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading">

    <!-- Step 1A: Category Selection -->
    <div class="category-label">Step 1 — Select Category</div>
    <div class="category-grid">
      <button type="button" class="category-card"
        *ngFor="let cat of categories"
        [class.selected]="selectedCategory === cat"
        (click)="selectCategory(cat)">
        <div class="cat-icon" [ngClass]="categoryMeta[cat].color">
          <i [class]="'bi ' + categoryMeta[cat].icon"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="cat-body">
          <span class="cat-title">{{ cat }}</span>
          <span class="cat-desc">{{ categoryMeta[cat].desc }}</span>
        </div>
        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill cat-check" *ngIf="selectedCategory === cat"></i>
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Step 1B: Type Selection — only shows after category selected -->
    <ng-container *ngIf="selectedCategory && filteredTypes.length > 0">
      <div class="category-label mt">Step 2 — Select Taxpayer Type</div>
      <div class="type-grid">
        <button type="button" class="type-card"
          *ngFor="let t of filteredTypes"
          [class.selected]="selectedTypeId === t.id"
          (click)="selectType(t)">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill type-check" *ngIf="selectedTypeId === t.id"></i>
          <span class="type-name">{{ t.typeName }}</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </ng-container>

  </ng-container>

  <div class="step-actions">
    <button type="button" class="btn-next"
      [disabled]="!canProceed"
      (click)="onNext()">
      Continue <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step3-identity/reg-step-identity/reg-step-identity.component.html
```html
<div class="step-body">

  <!-- ── INDIVIDUAL ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="isIndividual">
    <div class="step-intro">
      <h3 class="step-heading">Verify your National ID</h3>
      <p class="step-sub">
        Your NID is the anchor of your tax identity. A unique TIN will be
        auto-generated and permanently linked to your NID.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="nid-info-banner">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill"></i>
      <span>
        Each NID can only be linked to <strong>one TIN</strong>.
        If you already have a TIN, enable the toggle below instead of entering your NID again.
      </span>
    </div>

    <!-- Existing TIN toggle -->
    <div class="existing-tin-toggle">
      <label class="toggle-label">
        <input type="checkbox"
               [checked]="hasExistingTin"
               (change)="onToggleExistingTin($any($event.target).checked)" />
        <span class="toggle-text">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan"></i>
          I already have a TIN issued offline or at a Tax Circle office
        </span>
      </label>
    </div>

    <form [formGroup]="form" novalidate>
      <div class="form-grid">

        <!-- Existing TIN input — shown only when toggle is on -->
        <ng-container *ngIf="hasExistingTin">
          <div class="form-group full-width">
            <label class="form-label required">Your Existing TIN</label>
            <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('existingTin')?.invalid && ctrl('existingTin')?.touched">
              <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input"
                placeholder="e.g. TIN-20250101-A3F19C82"
                formControlName="existingTin"
                style="text-transform: uppercase" />
            </div>
            <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('existingTin')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('existingTin')?.touched">
              TIN is required.
            </span>
            <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('existingTin')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('existingTin')?.touched">
              Enter a valid TIN format (e.g. TIN-20250101-A3F19C82).
            </span>
            <span class="field-hint">
              <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>
              Your TIN will be verified against the NBR registry. Contact your Tax Circle if you are unsure.
            </span>
          </div>
        </ng-container>

        <!-- Standard NID fields — hidden when toggle is on -->
        <ng-container *ngIf="!hasExistingTin">

        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label required">National ID Number (NID)</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('nid')?.invalid && ctrl('nid')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-front-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="10 or 17 digit NID number"
              formControlName="nid" maxlength="17" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('nid')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('nid')?.touched">
            NID number is required.
          </span>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('nid')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('nid')?.touched">
            NID must be exactly 10 or 17 digits.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Date of Birth</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('dateOfBirth')?.invalid && ctrl('dateOfBirth')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="dateOfBirth"
              [max]="maxDob" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('dateOfBirth')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('dateOfBirth')?.touched">
            Date of birth is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Gender</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('gender')?.invalid && ctrl('gender')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-gender-ambiguous input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="gender">
              <option value="">Select gender</option>
              <option *ngFor="let g of genders" [value]="g">{{ g }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('gender')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('gender')?.touched">
            Gender is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Profession <span class="optional-label">(Optional)</span></label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="profession">
              <option value="">Select profession</option>
              <option *ngFor="let p of professions" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        </ng-container><!-- end *ngIf="!hasExistingTin" -->

      </div>
    </form>
  </ng-container>

  <!-- ── COMPANY ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="!isIndividual">
    <div class="step-intro">
      <h3 class="step-heading">Company Registration Details</h3>
      <p class="step-sub">
        Your RJSC registration number is the anchor of your corporate tax identity.
        A unique TIN will be auto-generated and linked to your company.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="nid-info-banner company">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill"></i>
      <span>
        Each RJSC number can only be linked to <strong>one TIN</strong>.
        If your company already has a TIN, enable the toggle below.
      </span>
    </div>

    <!-- Existing TIN toggle (company) -->
    <div class="existing-tin-toggle">
      <label class="toggle-label">
        <input type="checkbox"
               [checked]="hasExistingTin"
               (change)="onToggleExistingTin($any($event.target).checked)" />
        <span class="toggle-text">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan"></i>
          This company already has a TIN issued at a Tax Circle office
        </span>
      </label>
    </div>

    <form [formGroup]="form" novalidate>
      <div class="form-grid">

        <!-- Existing TIN input for company -->
        <ng-container *ngIf="hasExistingTin">
          <div class="form-group full-width">
            <label class="form-label required">Company's Existing TIN</label>
            <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('existingTin')?.invalid && ctrl('existingTin')?.touched">
              <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input"
                placeholder="e.g. TIN-20250101-A3F19C82"
                formControlName="existingTin"
                style="text-transform: uppercase" />
            </div>
            <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('existingTin')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('existingTin')?.touched">
              TIN is required.
            </span>
            <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('existingTin')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('existingTin')?.touched">
              Enter a valid TIN format (e.g. TIN-20250101-A3F19C82).
            </span>
          </div>
        </ng-container>

        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label required">Company Name</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('companyName')?.invalid && ctrl('companyName')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-building-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Registered company name (as per RJSC)"
              formControlName="companyName" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('companyName')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('companyName')?.touched">
            Company name is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">RJSC Registration Number</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('rjscNo')?.invalid && ctrl('rjscNo')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. C-12345/2020"
              formControlName="rjscNo" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('rjscNo')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('rjscNo')?.touched">
            RJSC registration number is required.
          </span>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('rjscNo')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('rjscNo')?.touched">
            Enter a valid RJSC number (6-20 characters, alphanumeric).
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Incorporation Date</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('incorporationDate')?.invalid && ctrl('incorporationDate')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="incorporationDate" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('incorporationDate')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('incorporationDate')?.touched">
            Incorporation date is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label">Nature of Business <span class="optional-label">(Optional)</span></label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. Manufacturing, Trading, Services"
              formControlName="natureOfBusiness" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Authorized Person Name</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('authorizedPersonName')?.invalid && ctrl('authorizedPersonName')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Director / MD / Authorized representative"
              formControlName="authorizedPersonName" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('authorizedPersonName')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('authorizedPersonName')?.touched">
            Authorized person name is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Authorized Person NID</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('authorizedPersonNid')?.invalid && ctrl('authorizedPersonNid')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-front-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="10 or 17 digit NID"
              formControlName="authorizedPersonNid" maxlength="17" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('authorizedPersonNid')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('authorizedPersonNid')?.touched">
            Authorized person NID is required.
          </span>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('authorizedPersonNid')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('authorizedPersonNid')?.touched">
            NID must be exactly 10 or 17 digits.
          </span>
        </div>

      </div>
    </form>
  </ng-container>

  <div class="step-actions">
    <button type="button" class="btn-back" (click)="back.emit()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="btn-next" (click)="onNext()">
      Review <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step5-success/reg-step-success/reg-step-success.component.html
```html
<div class="success-body">

  <div class="success-icon-ring">
    <div class="success-icon">
      <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i>
    </div>
  </div>

  <h3 class="success-title">Registration Successful!</h3>
  <p class="success-sub">
    Welcome to the Nirapod Tax Portal, <strong>{{ response.fullName }}</strong>.
    Your account has been created and your TIN has been issued.
  </p>

  <!-- TIN Certificate Preview -->
  <div class="tin-card">
    <div class="tin-card-header">
      <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
      <span>Government of Bangladesh — NBR</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tin-card-body">
      <span class="tin-label">Tax Identification Number (TIN)</span>
      <span class="tin-number">{{ response.tinNumber }}</span>
      <div class="tin-meta">
        <span><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ response.fullName }}</span>
        <span><i class="bi bi-tag-fill"></i> {{ response.accountCategory }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="tin-card-footer">
      Keep this number safe. You will need it for all tax filings.
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Next steps -->
  <div class="next-steps">
    <p class="ns-title"><i class="bi bi-map-fill"></i> Your Next Steps</p>
    <div class="ns-grid">
      <div class="ns-item">
        <span class="ns-num">1</span>
        <div>
          <strong>Log In</strong>
          <p>Use your email and password to access your portal dashboard.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ns-item">
        <span class="ns-num">2</span>
        <div>
          <strong>Complete Your Profile</strong>
          <p>Add your address and complete taxpayer details for accurate filings.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ns-item">
        <span class="ns-num">3</span>
        <div>
          <strong>File Your Returns</strong>
          <p>Submit VAT or income tax returns directly from your dashboard.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <button class="btn-go-login" (click)="goToLogin()">
    <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-in-right"></i> Go to Login
  </button>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-list/refund-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Refund Management</h4>
    <p>Manage all tax refund claims and processing.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/refunds/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> New Refund
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search by refund no, TIN, taxpayer, type..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm"
        />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
        <span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading refunds...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Refund No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th>Claim Amount</th>
          <th>Approved Amount</th>
          <th>Paid Amount</th>
          <th>Claim Date</th>
          <th>Method</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRefunds; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td><span class="refund-code">{{ r.refundNo }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(r.refundType)">
              {{ r.refundType }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td class="amount-cell claim-amount">
            {{ formatCurrency(r.claimAmount) }}
          </td>

          <td class="amount-cell approved-amount">
            {{ r.approvedAmount > 0 ? formatCurrency(r.approvedAmount) : '—' }}
          </td>

          <td class="amount-cell paid-amount">
            {{ r.paidAmount > 0 ? formatCurrency(r.paidAmount) : '—' }}
          </td>

          <td>{{ r.claimDate }}</td>

          <td>
            <span class="method-badge">{{ r.refundMethod }}</span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewRefund(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit"
                (click)="editRefund(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button
                *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete"
                (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)"
              >
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRefunds.length === 0">
          <td colspan="11">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i>
              <p>No refunds found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding: 12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRefunds">

      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.refundNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
          {{ r.status }}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>TIN</label>
          <span>{{ r.tinNumber }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Type</label>
          <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(r.refundType)">
            {{ r.refundType }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Claim Amount</label>
          <span class="claim-amount">{{ formatCurrency(r.claimAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Approved</label>
          <span class="approved-amount">
            {{ r.approvedAmount > 0 ? formatCurrency(r.approvedAmount) : '—' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Method</label>
          <span>{{ r.refundMethod }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Claim Date</label>
          <span>{{ r.claimDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="r.approvalDate">
          <label>Approval Date</label>
          <span>{{ r.approvalDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="r.remarks">
          <label>Remarks</label>
          <span>{{ r.remarks }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewRefund(r.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="editRefund(r.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
        </button>
        <button
          *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete"
          (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)"
        >
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
        </button>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRefunds.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i>
      <p>No refunds found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- FAB -->
<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn"
  routerLink="/refunds/create" title="New Refund">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Refund?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this refund record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/reports-home/reports-home.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div>
    <h2>Reports & Analytics</h2>
    <p>View key reports, statistics, and operational summaries.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="reports-grid">
  <div class="report-card" *ngFor="let card of reportCards">
    <h3>{{ card.title }}</h3>
    <h1>{{ card.value }}</h1>
    <p>{{ card.description }}</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="report-sections">
  <div class="section-card">
    <h3>Available Reports</h3>

    <div class="report-actions">
      <button class="primary-btn" (click)="generateReport('Tax')">Generate Tax Report</button>
      <button class="primary-btn" (click)="generateReport('VAT')">Generate VAT Report</button>
      <button class="primary-btn" (click)="generateReport('Audit')">Generate Audit Report</button>
      <button class="primary-btn" (click)="generateReport('Payment')">Generate Payment Report</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-card">
    <h3>Recent Reports</h3>

    <ul class="recent-report-list">
      <li *ngFor="let report of recentReports">{{ report }}</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/roles/pages/roles-create/roles-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Create New Role</h4>
    <p>Define a new system role with custom permissions.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to Roles
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Section 1: Role Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Role Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Name, code and description</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Role Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. Senior Tax Officer"
            [(ngModel)]="form.roleName"
            (ngModelChange)="onRoleNameChange()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Role Code <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-code-slash input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field"
            [value]="form.roleCode || 'Auto from name'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option value="Active">Active</option>
            <option value="Inactive">Inactive</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Role Color</label>
        <div class="color-wrap">
          <input type="color" class="color-picker" [(ngModel)]="form.color" />
          <span class="color-preview" [style.background]="form.color">
            {{ form.roleName || 'Role' }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-text-paragraph input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Describe this role's responsibilities..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.description" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Permissions -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple"><i class="bi bi-lock-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Module Permissions</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">{{ selectedPermCount }} permissions selected</span>
      </div>
      <div class="perm-quick-actions">
        <button class="pqa-btn" (click)="selectAllModules(true)">
          <i class="bi bi-check-all"></i> Select All
        </button>
        <button class="pqa-btn clear" (click)="selectAllModules(false)">
          <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Clear All
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="perm-table-wrap">
      <table class="perm-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th class="module-col">Module</th>
            <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-plus-circle-fill"></i><span>Create</span></th>
            <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i><span>Read</span></th>
            <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i><span>Update</span></th>
            <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i><span>Delete</span></th>
            <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span></th>
            <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-check-all"></i><span>All</span></th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr *ngFor="let m of modules; let odd = odd" [class.odd-row]="odd">
            <td class="module-name">{{ m }}</td>
            <td>
              <label class="check-wrap">
                <input type="checkbox" [(ngModel)]="form.permissions[m].create" />
                <span class="checkmark create"></span>
              </label>
            </td>
            <td>
              <label class="check-wrap">
                <input type="checkbox" [(ngModel)]="form.permissions[m].read" />
                <span class="checkmark read"></span>
              </label>
            </td>
            <td>
              <label class="check-wrap">
                <input type="checkbox" [(ngModel)]="form.permissions[m].update" />
                <span class="checkmark update"></span>
              </label>
            </td>
            <td>
              <label class="check-wrap">
                <input type="checkbox" [(ngModel)]="form.permissions[m].delete" />
                <span class="checkmark delete"></span>
              </label>
            </td>
            <td>
              <label class="check-wrap">
                <input type="checkbox" [(ngModel)]="form.permissions[m].export" />
                <span class="checkmark export"></span>
              </label>
            </td>
            <td>
              <label class="check-wrap">
                <input type="checkbox"
                  [checked]="isAllSelected(m)"
                  [indeterminate]="isSomeSelected(m)"
                  (change)="toggleAll(m, $any($event.target).checked)" />
                <span class="checkmark all"></span>
              </label>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i> Create Role</span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Creating...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/roles/pages/roles-list/roles-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Roles & Permissions</h4>
    <p>View access levels and permissions for each system role.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Role Selector Cards -->
<div class="role-selector">
  <div class="role-card"
    *ngFor="let r of roles"
    [class.selected]="selectedRole === r.role"
    (click)="selectRole(r.role)">
    <div class="rc-avatar" [ngClass]="getRoleColorClass(r.color)">
      <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="rc-info">
      <div class="rc-label">{{ r.label }}</div>
      <div class="rc-count">{{ r.userCount }} user{{ r.userCount > 1 ? 's' : '' }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="rc-perms">{{ countPermissions(r) }}<span>perms</span></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Permission Matrix -->
<div class="perm-section">
  <div class="perm-header">
    <div class="ph-left">
      <div class="ph-avatar" [ngClass]="getRoleColorClass(selectedRoleConfig.color)">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="ph-title">{{ selectedRoleConfig.label }}</div>
        <div class="ph-desc">{{ selectedRoleConfig.description }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ph-stats">
      <span class="ph-stat">{{ countPermissions(selectedRoleConfig) }} permissions</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="perm-table-wrap">
    <table class="perm-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th class="module-col">Module</th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-plus-circle-fill"></i><span>Create</span></th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i><span>Read</span></th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i><span>Update</span></th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i><span>Delete</span></th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span></th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let p of selectedRoleConfig.permissions; let odd = odd"
          [class.odd-row]="odd">
          <td class="module-name">{{ p.module }}</td>
          <td><span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.create" [class.no]="!p.create">
            <i [class]="p.create ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
          </span></td>
          <td><span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.read" [class.no]="!p.read">
            <i [class]="p.read ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
          </span></td>
          <td><span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.update" [class.no]="!p.update">
            <i [class]="p.update ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
          </span></td>
          <td><span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.delete" [class.no]="!p.delete">
            <i [class]="p.delete ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
          </span></td>
          <td><span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.export" [class.no]="!p.export">
            <i [class]="p.export ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
          </span></td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>
```
