## File: src/app/features/import-duty/pages/import-duty-create/import-duty-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>New Import Record</h4>
    <p>Create a new import duty assessment.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="form-card">
  <div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isMasterDataLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Importer -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Importer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Select taxpayer and business</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" (ngModelChange)="onTaxpayerChange()">
            <option value="">Select Taxpayer</option>
            <option *ngFor="let tp of taxpayers" [value]="getTin(tp)">
              {{ getTaxpayerName(tp) }} - {{ getTin(tp) }}
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Business <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" [value]="form.businessName || 'Auto from taxpayer'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Product -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Goods Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Select product and origin details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxable Product</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-box-seam input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.productId" (ngModelChange)="onProductChange()">
            <option [value]="0">Select Product</option>
            <option *ngFor="let p of products" [value]="p.id">
              {{ p.productName }} ({{ p.hsCode }})
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">HS Code <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" [value]="selectedProduct?.hsCode || 'Auto from product'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Goods Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-text input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Describe the goods being imported..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.goodsDescription" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Origin Country</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-globe input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.originCountry">
            <option value="">Select Country</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of countries" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Valuation -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon red">
        <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Duty Calculation</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">CIF value and official tax preview</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">CIF Value (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" placeholder="0" [(ngModel)]="form.cifValue"
            (ngModelChange)="onCifValueChange()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Source <span class="auto-label">Server</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" value="Backend preview" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Calculation Summary -->
    <div class="calc-summary" *ngIf="form.cifValue > 0">
      <div class="cs-row" *ngIf="isPreviewLoading">
        <span class="cs-label">Tax Preview</span>
        <span class="cs-value">Loading...</span>
      </div>
      <div class="cs-row">
        <span class="cs-label">CIF Value</span>
        <span class="cs-value">{{ fmt(form.cifValue) }}</span>
      </div>
      <ng-container *ngIf="taxPreview">
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">Customs Duty (CD<span *ngIf="taxPreview.cdRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.cdRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="cs-value duty">{{ fmt(taxPreview.customsDuty) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">Supplementary Duty (SD<span *ngIf="taxPreview.sdRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.sdRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="cs-value duty">{{ fmt(taxPreview.supplementaryDuty) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">VAT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.vatRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.vatRate }}%</span></span>
          <span class="cs-value vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.vat) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">Advance Income Tax (AIT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.aitRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.aitRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="cs-value vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.advanceIncomeTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">Advance Tax (AT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.atRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.atRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="cs-value vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.advanceTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-divider"></div>
        <div class="cs-row total-row">
          <span class="cs-label bold">Total Payable</span>
          <span class="cs-value total">{{ fmt(taxPreview.totalPayable) }}</span>
        </div>
      </ng-container>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Port & Shipping -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Port & Shipping Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Entry port, Bill of Entry, bill of lading and dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Port of Entry</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.portOfEntry">
            <option value="">Select Port</option>
            <option *ngFor="let p of ports" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Bill of Entry Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. BOE-2024-000345" [(ngModel)]="form.boeNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Bill of Entry Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.boeDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Bill of Lading / AWB</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. BL-2024-44821" [(ngModel)]="form.billOfLading" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Import Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.importDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Optional remarks..." [(ngModel)]="form.remarks"
            rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit danger" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-truck-front-fill"></i> Create Import Record</span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Creating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/import-duty/pages/import-duty-edit/import-duty-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Import Record</h4>
    <p>Update import duty assessment details.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View</button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}</div>
<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.dutyRef }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-sub">{{ form.businessName }}</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Goods & Valuation -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Goods & Valuation</h6><span class="section-sub">Product, origin and CIF value</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxable Product</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-box-seam input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.productId" (ngModelChange)="onProductChange()">
            <option [value]="0">Select Product</option>
            <option *ngFor="let p of products" [value]="p.id">{{ p.productName }} ({{ p.hsCode }})</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">HS Code <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-upc input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" [value]="selectedProduct?.hsCode || form.hsCode || 'Auto from product'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Goods Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-file-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.goodsDescription" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Origin Country</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-globe input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.originCountry">
            <option value="">Select Country</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of countries" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">CIF Value (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.cifValue" (ngModelChange)="onCifValueChange()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Source <span class="auto-label">Server</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-shield-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" value="Backend preview" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Calc Summary -->
    <div class="calc-summary" *ngIf="form.cifValue > 0">
      <div class="cs-row" *ngIf="isPreviewLoading"><span>Tax Preview</span><span>Loading...</span></div>
      <div class="cs-row"><span>CIF Value</span><span>{{ fmt(form.cifValue) }}</span></div>
      <ng-container *ngIf="taxPreview">
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span>Customs Duty (CD<span *ngIf="taxPreview.cdRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.cdRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="duty">{{ fmt(taxPreview.customsDuty) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span>Supplementary Duty (SD<span *ngIf="taxPreview.sdRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.sdRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="duty">{{ fmt(taxPreview.supplementaryDuty) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span>VAT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.vatRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.vatRate }}%</span></span>
          <span class="vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.vat) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span>Advance Income Tax (AIT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.aitRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.aitRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.advanceIncomeTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span>Advance Tax (AT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.atRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.atRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.advanceTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-divider"></div>
        <div class="cs-row total-row"><span class="bold">Total Payable</span><span class="total">{{ fmt(taxPreview.totalPayable) }}</span></div>
      </ng-container>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Port & Status -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon red"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Port, Shipping & Status</h6><span class="section-sub">Entry port, Bill of Entry, dates and current
          status</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Port of Entry</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.portOfEntry">
            <option value="">Select Port</option>
            <option *ngFor="let p of ports" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Bill of Entry Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.boeNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Bill of Entry Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.boeDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Bill of Lading / AWB</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.billOfLading" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Import Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.importDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Paid Amount (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.paidAmount" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel</button>
    <button class="btn-submit danger" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Import Record</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/tax-structure/pages/tax-structure-create/tax-structure-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Add Tax Structure</h4>
    <p>Define a new tax type, rate and applicability.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<!-- Loading master data spinner -->
<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isMasterLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-warning"></div>
  <p>Loading form data…</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isMasterLoading">

  <!-- ── Section 1: Tax Identity ── -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-sliders"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Identity</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Code, name, type and rate method</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group required">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Code</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. VAT-STD-001"
            [(ngModel)]="form.taxCode" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group required">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. Standard VAT, AIT on Salary"
            [(ngModel)]="form.taxName" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.taxType">
            <option value="">Select Type</option>
            <option *ngFor="let t of taxTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Rate Method</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [(ngModel)]="form.rateType"
            (change)="onRateTypeChange()">
            <option *ngFor="let r of rateTypes" [value]="r.value">{{ r.label }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <small class="form-hint" *ngIf="form.rateType === 'SLAB'">
          <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> Progressive slabs — define income brackets below.
        </small>
      </div>

      <!-- Flat Rate input (only for FLAT) -->
      <div class="form-group" *ngIf="form.rateType === 'FLAT'">
        <label class="form-label required">Rate (%)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap rate-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-percent input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input"
            placeholder="0" min="0" max="100" step="0.5"
            [(ngModel)]="form.rate"
            (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
          <span class="rate-suffix">%</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Applicable To</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-people-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.applicableTo">
            <option *ngFor="let a of applicables" [value]="a">{{ a }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div><!-- /form-grid -->
  </div><!-- /section 1 -->

  <!-- ── Section 2: Slabs (only when SLAB) ── -->
  <div class="form-section" *ngIf="form.rateType === 'SLAB'">
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange"><i class="bi bi-table"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Slabs</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Define progressive income brackets (sorted ascending)</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="slabs-table-wrap">
      <table class="slabs-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>#</th>
            <th>Min Amount (৳)</th>
            <th>Max Amount (৳) <small class="optional">blank = unlimited</small></th>
            <th>Rate (%)</th>
            <th>Label <small class="optional">(optional)</small></th>
            <th></th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr *ngFor="let slab of form.slabs; let i = index; trackBy: trackByIndex">
            <td class="slab-num">{{ i + 1 }}</td>
            <td>
              <input type="number" class="slab-input" min="0"
                [(ngModel)]="slab.minAmount"
                (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
            </td>
            <td>
              <input type="number" class="slab-input" min="0"
                [placeholder]="'unlimited'"
                [(ngModel)]="slab.maxAmount"
                (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
            </td>
            <td>
              <input type="number" class="slab-input slab-rate" min="0" max="100" step="0.5"
                [(ngModel)]="slab.rate"
                (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
              <span class="slab-pct">%</span>
            </td>
            <td>
              <input type="text" class="slab-input slab-label"
                placeholder="e.g. Up to ৳3,50,000"
                [(ngModel)]="slab.label" />
            </td>
            <td>
              <button class="btn-slab-remove" (click)="removeSlab(i)" title="Remove slab">
                <i class="bi bi-trash3"></i>
              </button>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
      <button class="btn-add-slab" (click)="addSlab()">
        <i class="bi bi-plus-circle"></i> Add Slab
      </button>
    </div>
  </div><!-- /slabs section -->

  <!-- ── Section 3: Preview (backend) ── -->
  <div class="section-divider"></div>
  <div class="form-section preview-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Preview</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Calculated by the server</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="preview-controls">
      <label class="form-label">Preview Amount (৳)</label>
      <div class="input-wrap preview-amount-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-currency-exchange input-icon"></i>
        <input type="number" class="form-input preview-input" min="1"
          [(ngModel)]="previewAmount"
          (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="preview-result" *ngIf="!isPreviewLoading && previewResult">
      <!-- FLAT result -->
      <div class="pr-flat" *ngIf="previewResult.rateType === 'FLAT'">
        <span class="pr-label">For ৳{{ previewAmount | number }}</span>
        <span class="pr-arrow">→</span>
        <span class="pr-tax">Tax = ৳{{ previewResult.taxAmount | number:'1.0-2' }}</span>
        <span class="pr-rate">({{ previewResult.effectiveRate }}%)</span>
      </div>

      <!-- SLAB result -->
      <div class="pr-slab" *ngIf="previewResult.rateType === 'SLAB'">
        <div class="pr-slab-summary">
          <span>Total Tax on ৳{{ previewAmount | number }}</span>
          <strong>= ৳{{ previewResult.taxAmount | number:'1.0-2' }}</strong>
          <span class="pr-rate">Effective rate: {{ previewResult.effectiveRate | number:'1.1-2' }}%</span>
        </div>
        <table class="pr-slab-table" *ngIf="previewResult.breakdown.length">
          <thead>
            <tr><th>Slab</th><th>Rate</th><th>Taxable</th><th>Tax</th></tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr *ngFor="let b of previewResult.breakdown">
              <td>{{ b.label || (b.slabMin | number) + ' – ' + (b.slabMax ? (b.slabMax | number) : '∞') }}</td>
              <td>{{ b.slabRate }}%</td>
              <td>৳{{ b.taxableInSlab | number:'1.0-0' }}</td>
              <td>৳{{ b.taxInSlab    | number:'1.0-0' }}</td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="preview-loading" *ngIf="isPreviewLoading">
      <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Calculating…
    </div>
  </div><!-- /preview section -->

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- ── Section 4: Validity ── -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Validity Period & Status</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Effective and expiry dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Effective Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.effectiveDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Expiry Date <span class="optional">(optional)</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.expiryDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- ── Section 5: Description ── -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple"><i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Description</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Additional details about this tax</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-text-paragraph input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Describe this tax structure…"
            [(ngModel)]="form.description" rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Actions ── -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Create Tax Structure</span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Creating…</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div><!-- /form-card -->
```

## File: src/app/features/tax-structure/pages/tax-structure-list/tax-structure-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Tax Structure</h4>
    <p>Manage all tax types, rates and applicability rules.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/tax-structure/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Add Tax Structure
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by code, name, type..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading tax structures...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Tax Code</th>
          <th>Tax Name</th>
          <th>Tax Type</th>
          <th>Rate (%)</th>
          <th>Applicable To</th>
          <th>Effective Date</th>
          <th>Expiry Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let t of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="tax-code">{{ t.taxCode }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar tax-avatar">
                <i class="bi bi-percent"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ t.taxName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ t.description | slice:0:40 }}...</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(t.taxType)">{{ t.taxType }}</span></td>
          <td><span class="rate-badge">{{ t.rate }}%</span></td>
          <td><span class="applicable-badge">{{ t.applicableTo }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ t.effectiveDate }}</td>
          <td>
            <span [class]="isExpired(t.expiryDate) ? 'expiry-red' : 'expiry-normal'">
              {{ t.expiryDate || '—' }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(t.status)">{{ t.status }}</span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(t.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(t.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(t.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="10">
            <div class="empty-state"><i class="bi bi-sliders"></i><p>No tax structures found.</p></div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let t of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar tax-avatar"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ t.taxName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ t.taxCode }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(t.status)">{{ t.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Type</label>
          <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(t.taxType)">{{ t.taxType }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Rate</label><span class="rate-badge">{{ t.rate }}%</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Applicable To</label><span>{{ t.applicableTo }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Effective</label><span>{{ t.effectiveDate }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="t.expiryDate"><label>Expiry</label>
          <span [class]="isExpired(t.expiryDate) ? 'expiry-red' : ''">{{ t.expiryDate }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(t.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-sliders"></i><p>No tax structures found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/tax-structure/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Tax Structure?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this tax structure?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/tax-structure/pages/tax-structure-view/tax-structure-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Tax Structure Details</h4>
    <p>Full tax structure information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-warning"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && tax">

  <!-- Header Card -->
  <div class="view-header-card">
    <div class="thc-left">
      <div class="thc-icon"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="thc-code">{{ tax.taxCode }}</div>
        <div class="thc-name">{{ tax.taxName }}</div>
        <div class="thc-meta">
          <span class="type-badge header-type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(tax.taxType)">
            {{ tax.taxType }}
          </span>
          <span class="applicable-badge">{{ tax.applicableTo }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(tax.status)">
            {{ tax.status }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="thc-rate">
      <div class="thc-rate-value">{{ tax.rate }}%</div>
      <div class="thc-rate-label">Tax Rate</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Rate Preview -->
  <div class="rate-preview-card">
    <div class="rpc-title">
      <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i> Rate Calculation Preview
    </div>
    <div class="rpc-examples">
      <div class="rpc-item">
        <span class="rpc-base">৳1,00,000</span>
        <span class="rpc-arrow">→</span>
        <span class="rpc-tax">৳{{ (100000 * tax.rate / 100) | number:'1.0-0' }}</span>
        <span class="rpc-label">Tax</span>
      </div>
      <div class="rpc-item">
        <span class="rpc-base">৳5,00,000</span>
        <span class="rpc-arrow">→</span>
        <span class="rpc-tax">৳{{ (500000 * tax.rate / 100) | number:'1.0-0' }}</span>
        <span class="rpc-label">Tax</span>
      </div>
      <div class="rpc-item">
        <span class="rpc-base">৳10,00,000</span>
        <span class="rpc-arrow">→</span>
        <span class="rpc-tax">৳{{ (1000000 * tax.rate / 100) | number:'1.0-0' }}</span>
        <span class="rpc-label">Tax</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill"></i>
        <span>Tax Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Code</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ tax.taxCode }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ tax.taxName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="type-badge detail-type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(tax.taxType)">{{ tax.taxType }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Rate</span>
          <span class="detail-value rate-val">{{ tax.rate }}%</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Applicable To</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tax.applicableTo }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(tax.status)">{{ tax.status }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i>
        <span>Validity Period</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Effective Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ tax.effectiveDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Expiry Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value" [ngClass]="{'expiry-red': isExpired(tax.expiryDate)}">
            {{ tax.expiryDate || 'No Expiry' }}
          </span>

        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Created By</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tax.createdBy }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Created At</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tax.createdAt }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card full-card" *ngIf="tax.description">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
        <span>Description</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div style="padding:14px 18px; font-size:13px; color:#444; line-height:1.7;">
          {{ tax.description }}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/taxable-products/pages/taxable-product-create/taxable-product-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-wrapper">
  <div class="form-card">

    <div class="card-header">
      <h2 class="card-title">Add Taxable Product</h2>
    </div>

    <div class="card-body">

      <div *ngIf="isMasterDataLoading" class="loading-state">Loading product master data...</div>
      <div *ngIf="successMsg" class="alert-success">{{ successMsg }}</div>
      <div *ngIf="errorMsg" class="alert-error">{{ errorMsg }}</div>

      <form (ngSubmit)="onSubmit()" #productForm="ngForm">

        <div class="form-row">

          <!-- Product Name -->
          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="productName" class="form-label">Product Name <span class="required">*</span></label>
            <input
              id="productName"
              type="text"
              class="form-control"
              name="productName"
              [(ngModel)]="form.productName"
              required
              placeholder="e.g. Premium Rice">
          </div>

          <!-- HS Code -->
          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="hsCode" class="form-label">HS Code <span class="required">*</span></label>
            <input
              id="hsCode"
              type="text"
              class="form-control"
              name="hsCode"
              [(ngModel)]="form.hsCode"
              required
              placeholder="e.g. 1006.30">
          </div>

        </div>

        <div class="form-row">

          <!-- Category - dynamic dropdown -->
          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="category" class="form-label">Category <span class="required">*</span></label>
            <select
              id="category"
              class="form-control"
              name="category"
              [(ngModel)]="form.category"
              required>
              <option value="" disabled>Select category</option>
              <option *ngFor="let cat of categories" [value]="cat">{{ cat }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <!-- Unit - dynamic dropdown -->
          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="unit" class="form-label">Unit <span class="required">*</span></label>
            <select
              id="unit"
              class="form-control"
              name="unit"
              [(ngModel)]="form.unit"
              required>
              <option value="" disabled>Select unit</option>
              <option *ngFor="let u of units" [value]="u">{{ u }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>

        </div>

        <div class="form-row">

          <!-- Tax Structure - dynamic dropdown -->
          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="taxStructureId" class="form-label">Tax Structure <span class="required">*</span></label>
            <select
              id="taxStructureId"
              class="form-control"
              name="taxStructureId"
              [(ngModel)]="form.taxStructureId"
              (ngModelChange)="onTaxStructureChange()"
              required>
              <option [value]="0" disabled>Select tax structure</option>
              <option *ngFor="let ts of taxStructures" [value]="ts.id">
                {{ ts.taxName }} ({{ ts.taxCode }})
              </option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <!-- Tax Rate Preview - read-only, derived from selected TaxStructure -->
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Tax Rate (Preview)</label>
            <input
              type="text"
              class="form-control form-control-readonly"
              [value]="selectedTaxStructure ? (selectedTaxRate + '% - ' + selectedTaxType) : 'Select a tax structure'"
              readonly>
            <small class="field-hint">Automatically determined by the selected tax structure.</small>
          </div>

        </div>

        <!-- Description -->
        <div class="form-group form-group-full">
          <label for="description" class="form-label">Description</label>
          <textarea
            id="description"
            class="form-control"
            name="description"
            [(ngModel)]="form.description"
            rows="3"
            placeholder="Optional product description"></textarea>
        </div>

        <!-- Status -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label for="status" class="form-label">Status <span class="required">*</span></label>
          <select
            id="status"
            class="form-control"
            name="status"
            [(ngModel)]="form.status"
            required>
            <option *ngFor="let status of statuses" [value]="status">{{ status }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        <!-- Actions -->
        <div class="form-actions">
          <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">Cancel</button>
          <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">Reset</button>
          <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary" [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
            {{ isLoading ? 'Saving...' : 'Save Product' }}
          </button>
        </div>

      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/taxable-products/pages/taxable-product-view/taxable-product-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Product Details</h4>
    <p>Full taxable product information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && product">

  <!-- Header Card -->
  <div class="view-header-card">
    <div class="phc-left">
      <div class="phc-icon"><i [class]="getCategoryIcon(product.category)"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="phc-code">{{ product.productCode }}</div>
        <div class="phc-name">{{ product.productName }}</div>
        <div class="phc-meta">
          <span class="hs-pill">HS: {{ product.hsCode }}</span>
          <span class="cat-pill-sm">{{ product.category }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(product.status)">
            {{ product.status }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="phc-right">
      <div class="phc-rate">{{ product.taxRate === 0 ? 'Zero' : product.taxRate + '%' }}</div>
      <div class="phc-rate-label">{{ product.taxType }}</div>
      <div class="phc-unit">Per {{ product.unit }}</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i>
        <span>Product Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Product Code</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge cyan">{{ product.productCode }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Product Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ product.productName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">HS Code</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge blue">{{ product.hsCode }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Category</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ product.category }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Unit</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ product.unit }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(product.status)">{{ product.status }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-percent"></i>
        <span>Tax Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <!-- FIX: product.taxStructure.taxName → enrichProduct এ taxType ও taxRate আছে -->
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ product.taxType }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Rate</span>
          <span class="detail-value rate-big">
            {{ product.taxRate === 0 ? 'Zero Rated (0%)' : product.taxRate + '%' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Created At</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ product.createdAt }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card full-card" *ngIf="product.description">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
        <span>Description</span>
      </div>
      <div style="padding:14px 18px; font-size:13px; color:#444; line-height:1.7;">
        {{ product.description }}
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/taxpayer-portal/pages/portal-home/portal-home.component.html
```html
<div class="portal-home" *ngIf="!isLoading">
  
  <!-- Profile Card -->
  <div class="profile-card">
    <div class="avatar-wrap">
      <img *ngIf="photoUrl" [src]="photoUrl" class="avatar-img" alt="Profile"/>
      <div *ngIf="!photoUrl" class="avatar-initials">
        {{ displayName.charAt(0) | uppercase }}
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="profile-info">
      <h2>{{ displayName }}</h2>
      <div class="profile-badges">
        <span class="badge green">Active</span>
        <span class="badge blue">{{ taxpayerTypeName }}</span>
      </div>
      <p class="tin" *ngIf="taxpayer?.tinNumber">
        TIN: {{ taxpayer!.tinNumber }}
      </p>
      <p class="tin pending" *ngIf="!taxpayer?.tinNumber">
        TIN: Pending approval
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Profile Completion Card -->
  <div class="completion-card" *ngIf="missingFields.length > 0">
    <div class="completion-header">
      <div class="completion-left">
        <span class="completion-title">Profile Completion</span>
        <span class="completion-hint">Complete your profile to get full access</span>
      </div>
      <span class="completion-percent" [ngStyle]="{'color': completionColor}">
        {{ profileCompletion }}%
      </span>
    </div>

    <div class="completion-bar">
      <div class="completion-fill"
           [ngStyle]="{'width': profileCompletion + '%', 'background': completionColor}">
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="missing-section">
      <span class="missing-title">Missing:</span>
      <div class="missing-tags">
        <span *ngFor="let f of missingFields" class="missing-tag">{{ f }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <button (click)="onComplete()" class="complete-btn">
      Complete Profile →
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Profile Complete Banner -->
  <div class="completion-done" *ngIf="missingFields.length === 0">
    <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i>
    Your profile is complete!
  </div>

 <!-- Stats Row — replace the existing stats-row div with this -->
  <div class="stats-row">
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-label">Compliance score</div>
      <div class="stat-value green"
           [ngStyle]="{'color': complianceColor}">
        {{ itrReturns.length === 0 ? '—' : complianceScore + '%' }}
      </div>
      <div class="stat-sub">
        {{ itrReturns.length === 0 ? 'No returns filed yet' : complianceScore >= 80 ? 'Good standing' : 'Needs attention' }}
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-label">Returns filed</div>
      <div class="stat-value">{{ totalReturnsFiled }}</div>
      <div class="stat-sub">
        {{ totalReturnsFiled === 0 ? 'No returns yet' : 'Income tax returns' }}
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-label">Outstanding dues</div>
      <div class="stat-value red">
        {{ outstandingDues === 0 ? '৳ 0' : formatDues(outstandingDues) }}
      </div>
      <div class="stat-sub">
        {{ outstandingDues === 0 ? 'No dues found' : 'Pending payment' }}
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-label">Last activity</div>
      <div class="stat-value small">{{ lastActivity }}</div>
      <div class="stat-sub">
        {{ itrReturns.length === 0 ? 'No activity yet' : 'Last ITR filed' }}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Quick Access -->
  <div class="section-title">Quick access</div>
  <div class="menu-grid">
    <a *ngFor="let item of menuItems"
       [routerLink]="item.route"
       class="menu-card">
      <span class="menu-icon">{{ item.icon }}</span>
      <span class="menu-label">{{ item.label }}</span>
      <span class="menu-arrow">→</span>
    </a>
  </div>

  <!-- Coming Soon -->
  <div class="coming-soon">
    <div class="coming-soon-icon">🚧</div>
    <div class="coming-soon-text">
      <strong>Tax summary & compliance details</strong>
      <span>Coming soon — full dashboard under development</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="loading-state" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner"></div>
  <p>Loading your portal...</p>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/tin-management/pages/tin-edit/tin-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit TIN</h4>
    <p>Update TIN record details.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.taxpayerName }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-tin">{{ form.tinNumber }}</span>
  </div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Name, category and identification</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.tinCategory">
            <option *ngFor="let c of tinCategories" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Issue Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.issuedDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <ng-container *ngIf="isIndividual">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">National ID</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-card-text input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.nid" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Passport No.</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-passport input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.passportNo" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Date of Birth</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.dateOfBirth" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </ng-container>

      <div class="form-group" *ngIf="isCompany">
        <label class="form-label">Incorporation Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incorporationDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Location & Tax Authority</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Select division → district → tax zone → tax circle</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Division</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-map-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="selectedDivisionId" (ngModelChange)="onDivisionChange()">
            <option [ngValue]="null">Select Division</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of divisions" [ngValue]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">District</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-fill input-icon"></i>
          <span *ngIf="loadingDistricts" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm dropdown-spinner"></span>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.district" (ngModelChange)="onDistrictChange()"
            [disabled]="!selectedDivisionId || loadingDistricts">
            <option value="">Select District</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of districts" [value]="d.name">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Zone</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
          <span *ngIf="loadingZones" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm dropdown-spinner"></span>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.taxZone" (ngModelChange)="onZoneChange()"
            [disabled]="!form.district || loadingZones">
            <option value="">Select Tax Zone</option>
            <option *ngFor="let z of taxZones" [value]="z.name">{{ z.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Circle</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-circle-fill input-icon"></i>
          <span *ngIf="loadingCircles" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm dropdown-spinner"></span>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.taxCircle"
            [disabled]="!form.taxZone || loadingCircles">
            <option value="">Select Tax Circle</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of taxCircles" [value]="c.name">{{ c.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Email</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.email" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Phone</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.phone" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.address" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Status & Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Account status and optional notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Optional remarks..." [(ngModel)]="form.remarks"
            rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update TIN</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```
