## File: src/app/features/ait/pages/ait-list/ait-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>AIT — Advance Income Tax</h4>
    <p>Manage all advance income tax deductions at source.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/my-portal/ait/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> New AIT
  </a>
</div>

<!-- Stats Row -->
<div class="stats-row">
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="sc-icon"><i class="bi bi-collection-fill"></i></div>
    <div class="sc-body">
      <span class="sc-label">Total Records</span>
      <span class="sc-value">{{ records.length }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="sc-icon deposited"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i></div>
    <div class="sc-body">
      <span class="sc-label">Deposited</span>
      <span class="sc-value">{{ countByStatus('Deposited') }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="sc-icon pending"><i class="bi bi-hourglass-split"></i></div>
    <div class="sc-body">
      <span class="sc-label">Pending</span>
      <span class="sc-value">{{ countByStatus('Deducted') }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card total-ait">
    <div class="sc-icon ait"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i></div>
    <div class="sc-body">
      <span class="sc-label">Total AIT Collected</span>
      <span class="sc-value ait">{{ formatCurrency(totalAIT) }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by ref, TIN, taxpayer, source, deducted by..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading AIT records...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>AIT Ref</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Source Type</th>
          <th>Gross Amount</th>
          <th>AIT Rate</th>
          <th>AIT Amount</th>
          <th>Deducted By</th>
          <th>Deduction Date</th>
          <th>Fiscal Year</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ait-ref">{{ r.aitRef }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar ait-avatar"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="src-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(r.sourceType)">
              {{ r.sourceType }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td class="amt-cell">{{ formatCurrency(r.grossAmount) }}</td>
          <td><span class="rate-chip">{{ r.aitRate }}%</span></td>
          <td class="amt-cell ait-amount">{{ formatCurrency(r.aitAmount) }}</td>
          <td>{{ r.deductedBy }}</td>
          <td>{{ r.deductionDate }}</td>
          <td><span class="fy-badge">{{ r.fiscalYear }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="12">
            <div class="empty-state"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i><p>No AIT records found.</p></div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar ait-avatar"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.aitRef }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>TIN</label><span>{{ r.tinNumber }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Source</label>
          <span class="src-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(r.sourceType)">{{ r.sourceType }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Gross Amount</label><span>{{ formatCurrency(r.grossAmount) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>AIT Rate</label><span>{{ r.aitRate }}%</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>AIT Amount</label><span class="ait-amount">{{ formatCurrency(r.aitAmount) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Deducted By</label><span>{{ r.deductedBy }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Date</label><span>{{ r.deductionDate }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-percent"></i><p>No AIT records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/ait/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>


<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Business?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this business record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/business-registration/pages/business-create/business-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Register Business</h4>
    <p>Register a new business entity.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Section 0: Taxpayer Search (TIN-style) -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon search-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Find Taxpayer</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Search by TIN number or name — details will auto-fill</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="search-row">
      <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill input-icon"></i>
        <input type="text" class="form-input"
          placeholder="Enter TIN number or taxpayer name..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
          (keyup.enter)="searchTaxpayer()"
          [disabled]="isAutoFilled" />
        <button *ngIf="isAutoFilled" class="clear-btn" (click)="clearTaxpayer()">
          <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
      <button class="btn-search" (click)="searchTaxpayer()" [disabled]="isSearching || isAutoFilled">
        <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
        <span *ngIf="isSearching"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Searching...</span>
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Search Results List -->
    <div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
      <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let taxpayer of searchResults" (click)="selectTaxpayer(taxpayer)">
        <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
        <div class="result-info">
          <span class="result-name">{{ taxpayer.fullName }}</span>
          <span class="result-meta">TIN: {{ taxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
        </div>
        <span class="result-badge">Select</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- No results -->
    <div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="hasSearched && searchResults.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> No taxpayer found. Please check the TIN or name.
    </div>

    <!-- Selected Taxpayer Card -->
    <div class="selected-card" *ngIf="isAutoFilled && selectedTaxpayer">
      <div class="selected-card-left">
        <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i></div>
        <div>
          <p class="selected-name">{{ selectedTaxpayer.fullName }}</p>
          <p class="selected-meta">TIN: {{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="autofill-tag"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Auto-filled</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 1: Business Identity -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Business Identity</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Basic business identification details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Enter business name"
            [(ngModel)]="form.businessName" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- TIN — auto fills from taxpayer -->
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field"
            placeholder="Auto from taxpayer"
            [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Owner — auto fills from taxpayer -->
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Owner Name <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field"
            placeholder="Auto from taxpayer"
            [(ngModel)]="form.ownerName" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.businessTypeId">
            <option [ngValue]="0">Select Type</option>
            <option *ngFor="let item of businessTypes" [ngValue]="item.id">
              {{ item.typeName }}
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.businessCategoryId">
            <option [ngValue]="0">Select Category</option>
            <option *ngFor="let item of businessCategories" [ngValue]="item.id">
              {{ item.categoryName }}
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: License & Registration -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">License & Registration</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Trade license, BIN and dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Trade License No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-journal-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. TL-44821"
            [(ngModel)]="form.tradeLicenseNo" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Incorporation Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incorporationDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Registration Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.registrationDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Trade License Expiry Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.expiryDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Contact & Location -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Contact & Location</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Contact details and business address</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Email</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input"
            placeholder="business@example.com"
            [(ngModel)]="form.email" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Phone</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="01xxx-xxxxxx"
            [(ngModel)]="form.phone" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Division</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-map-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [(ngModel)]="form.divisionId"
            (ngModelChange)="onDivisionChange()">
            <option [ngValue]="0">Select Division</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of divisions" [ngValue]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">District</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [(ngModel)]="form.districtId"
            [disabled]="!form.divisionId || districts.length === 0">
            <option [ngValue]="0">
              {{ !form.divisionId ? 'Select division first' : districts.length === 0 ? 'Loading...' : 'Select District' }}
            </option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of districts" [ngValue]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Full Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Enter full business address..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.address" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Financial & Workforce -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Financial & Workforce</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Turnover and employee information</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Annual Turnover (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input"
            placeholder="0"
            [(ngModel)]="form.annualTurnover" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Number of Employees</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-people-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input"
            placeholder="0"
            [(ngModel)]="form.numberOfEmployees" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Optional remarks..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i> Register Business
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Registering...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/payments/pages/payment-edit/payment-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Payment</h4>
    <p>Update payment transaction details.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<!-- Loading -->
<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading payment data...</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading && payment">

  <!-- TXN ID Banner -->
  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing Transaction: <strong>{{ payment.transactionId }}</strong>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Taxpayer Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">TIN and taxpayer identification</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.tinNumber" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.taxpayerName" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Payment Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.paymentType" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ✅ Editable -->
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of availableStatuses" [value]="s">
              {{ s }}
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Return / Ref No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.returnNo" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Payment Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-credit-card-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Payment Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Amount, method and transaction info</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Amount (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [value]="payment.amount" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Payment Method</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-wallet2 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.paymentMethod" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Reference No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-hash input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.referenceNo" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Cheque No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-journal-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.chequeNo" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Payment Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [value]="payment.paymentDate | date:'yyyy-MM-dd'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Value Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [value]="payment.valueDate | date:'yyyy-MM-dd'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Bank Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Bank Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Bank, branch and account information</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Bank Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-bank input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.bankName" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Branch</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.bankBranch" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Account No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-credit-card input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.accountNo" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Remarks -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Optional notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks / Notes</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <!-- ✅ Editable -->
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>

    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">

      <span *ngIf="!isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Payment
      </span>

      <span *ngIf="isSaving">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Updating...
      </span>

    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/payments/pages/payment-view/payment-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Payment Details</h4>
    <p>Full transaction information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <ng-container *ngIf="canEdit()">
      <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
        <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
      </button>
    </ng-container>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Loading -->
<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && payment">

  <!-- Transaction Header Card -->
  <div class="view-header-card">
    <div class="txn-header-left">
      <div class="txn-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-credit-card-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="txn-id">{{ payment.transactionId }}</div>
        <div class="txn-meta">
          <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(payment.paymentType)">
            {{ payment.paymentType }}
          </span>
          <span class="txn-date">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> {{ payment.paymentDate }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="txn-header-right">
      <div class="txn-amount">{{ formatCurrency(payment.amount) }}</div>
      <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(payment.status)">
        {{ payment.status }}
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <!-- Taxpayer Info -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
        <span>Taxpayer Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">TIN Number</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ payment.tinNumber }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Taxpayer Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ payment.taxpayerName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="payment.returnNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Return / Ref No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ payment.returnNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Payment Info -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-credit-card-fill"></i>
        <span>Payment Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Payment Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(payment.paymentType)">
              {{ payment.paymentType }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Payment Method</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.paymentMethod }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Amount</span>
          <span class="detail-value amount-large">{{ formatCurrency(payment.amount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Payment Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.paymentDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Value Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.valueDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Reference No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ payment.referenceNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="payment.chequeNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Cheque No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.chequeNo }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Bank Info -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
        <span>Bank Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Bank Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ payment.bankName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="payment.bankBranch">
          <span class="detail-label">Branch</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.bankBranch }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="payment.accountNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Account No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ payment.accountNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Processing Info -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-gear"></i>
        <span>Processing Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(payment.status)">
              {{ payment.status }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Processed By</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.processedBy }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Created At</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.createdAt }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="payment.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.remarks }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/taxable-products/pages/taxable-product-list/taxable-product-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Taxable Products</h4>
    <p>Manage all taxable products with HS codes and tax rates.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/taxable-products/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Add Product
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by name, HS code, category, tax type..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export" (click)="exportProducts()">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading products...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Code</th>
          <th>Product</th>
          <th>HS Code</th>
          <th>Category</th>
          <th>Tax Type</th>
          <th>Tax Rate</th>
          <th>Unit</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let p of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="prod-code">{{ p.productCode }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <!-- FIX: prod-avatar → td-avatar (CSS class নাম ঠিক করা হয়েছে) -->
              <div class="td-avatar">
                <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(p.category)"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ p.productName }}</span>
                <!-- FIX: description null/undefined হলে slice crash করত -->
                <span class="td-sub">{{ (p.description || '') | slice:0:35 }}...</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="hs-code">{{ p.hsCode }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="cat-pill">
              <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(p.category)"></i>
              {{ p.category }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td><span class="tax-type-badge">{{ p.taxType }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="rate-chip" [class.zero-rate]="p.taxRate === 0">
              {{ p.taxRate === 0 ? 'Zero' : p.taxRate + '%' }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td><span class="unit-badge">{{ p.unit }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">{{ p.status }}</span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(p.id)"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View</button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(p.id)"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(p.id)"><i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i></button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="10">
            <div class="empty-state"><i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i><p>No products found.</p></div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let p of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <!-- FIX: mobile-avatar prod-avatar → mobile-avatar (CSS class ঠিক করা হয়েছে) -->
          <div class="mobile-avatar"><i [class]="getCategoryIcon(p.category)"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ p.productName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ p.hsCode }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">{{ p.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Category</label><span>{{ p.category }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Type</label><span>{{ p.taxType }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Rate</label>
          <span class="rate-chip" [class.zero-rate]="p.taxRate === 0">
            {{ p.taxRate === 0 ? 'Zero Rated' : p.taxRate + '%' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Unit</label><span>{{ p.unit }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <!-- FIX: mobile card actions এ view ও edit button যোগ করা হয়েছে -->
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
        </button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i><p>No products found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/taxable-products/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Taxable Product?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this taxable product?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/taxpayer-portal/layout/portal-layout/portal-layout.component.html
```html
<div class="portal-shell">

  <!-- TOP NAV -->
  <header class="portal-nav">
    <div class="nav-brand">
      <div class="brand-emblem">
        <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none">
          <rect width="28" height="28" rx="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)"/>
          <path d="M14 4L24 9V14C24 19.5 19.5 24 14 24C8.5 24 4 19.5 4 14V9L14 4Z" 
                fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.9)" stroke="none"/>
          <path d="M10 14L13 17L18 11" stroke="#1a7a4a" stroke-width="2" 
                stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="brand-text">
        <span class="brand-name">NBR Portal</span>
        <span class="brand-sub">Government of Bangladesh</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="nav-center">
      <span class="nav-title">National VAT & Tax Management System</span>
    </div>

    <div class="nav-right">
      <!-- User Menu -->
      <div class="user-menu" 
           (click)="toggleDropdown()" 
           [class.open]="showDropdown">

        <div class="user-avatar-ring">
          <img *ngIf="currentUser?.photoUrl"
               [src]="currentUser!.photoUrl"
               class="user-photo"/>
          <div *ngIf="!currentUser?.photoUrl" class="user-monogram">
            {{ currentUser?.fullName?.charAt(0) | uppercase }}
          </div>
          <div class="online-dot"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="user-meta">
          <span class="user-name">{{ currentUser?.fullName }}</span>
          <span class="user-role">{{ currentUser?.taxpayerType }}</span>
        </div>

        <div class="chevron" [class.flipped]="showDropdown">
          <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none">
            <path d="M2 4L6 8L10 4" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.7)" 
                  stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
          </svg>
        </div>

        <!-- Dropdown -->
        <div class="user-dropdown" *ngIf="showDropdown" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">
          <div class="dropdown-profile">
            <div class="dp-avatar">
              <img *ngIf="currentUser?.photoUrl" [src]="currentUser!.photoUrl" class="dp-photo"/>
              <div *ngIf="!currentUser?.photoUrl" class="dp-monogram">
                {{ currentUser?.fullName?.charAt(0) | uppercase }}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="dp-info">
              <div class="dp-name">{{ currentUser?.fullName }}</div>
              <div class="dp-email">{{ currentUser?.email }}</div>
              <span class="dp-badge">{{ currentUser?.taxpayerType }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="dropdown-body">
            <a class="dd-item" routerLink="/my-portal" (click)="showDropdown = false">
              <div class="dd-icon">
                <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                  <rect x="1" y="1" width="6" height="6" rx="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
                  <rect x="9" y="1" width="6" height="6" rx="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
                  <rect x="1" y="9" width="6" height="6" rx="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
                  <rect x="9" y="9" width="6" height="6" rx="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <span>My Portal</span>
            </a>

            <div class="dd-divider"></div>

            <button class="dd-item danger" (click)="logout()">
              <div class="dd-icon">
                <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                  <path d="M6 2H3a1 1 0 00-1 1v10a1 1 0 001 1h3M10 11l3-3-3-3M13 8H6" 
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <span>Sign out</span>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- Breadcrumb -->
  <nav class="portal-breadcrumb" *ngIf="currentPageTitle">
    <a routerLink="/my-portal" class="breadcrumb-home">
      <i class="bi bi-house-fill"></i>
      <span>My Portal</span>
    </a>
    <i class="bi bi-chevron-right breadcrumb-sep"></i>
    <span class="breadcrumb-current">{{ currentPageTitle }}</span>
  </nav>  

  <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
  <main class="portal-main">
    <div class="portal-container">
      <router-outlet></router-outlet>
    </div>
  </main>

  <!-- FOOTER -->
  <footer class="portal-footer">
    <span>© {{ currentYear }} National Board of Revenue, Bangladesh</span>
    <span class="footer-sep">·</span>
    <span>Secure Government Portal</span>
  </footer>

</div>
```

```css
.section-icon.purple { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #a855f7); }

.ts-value.settled { color: #1faa8b; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; }
```

## File: src/app/features/ait/pages/ait-view/ait-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>AIT ait Details</h4>
    <p>Full advance income tax deduction information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back</button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border" style="color:#7c3aed"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && ait">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="view-header-card">
    <div class="ahc-left">
      <div class="ahc-icon"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="ahc-ref">{{ ait.aitRef }}</div>
        <div class="ahc-name">{{ ait.taxpayerName }}</div>
        <div class="ahc-meta">
          <span class="src-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(ait.sourceType)">{{ ait.sourceType }}</span>
          <span class="fy-pill">{{ ait.fiscalYear }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(ait.status)">{{ ait.status }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ahc-right">
      <div class="ahc-ait-amount">{{ formatCurrency(ait.aitAmount) }}</div>
      <div class="ahc-ait-label">AIT Amount</div>
      <div class="ahc-rate">{{ ait.aitRate }}% Rate</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Summary Cards -->
  <div class="ait-summary-row">
    <div class="as-card">
      <div class="asc-icon gross"><i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i></div>
      <div><span class="asc-label">Gross Amount</span><span class="asc-value">{{ formatCurrency(ait.grossAmount)
          }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="as-card">
      <div class="asc-icon rate"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div><span class="asc-label">AIT Rate</span><span class="asc-value rate">{{ ait.aitRate }}%</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="as-card highlight">
      <div class="asc-icon ait"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></div>
      <div><span class="asc-label">AIT Amount</span><span class="asc-value ait">{{ formatCurrency(ait.aitAmount)
          }}</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i><span>Taxpayer Information</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">TIN Number</span><span class="detail-value"><span
              class="code-badge">{{ ait.tinNumber }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Taxpayer Name</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{
            ait.taxpayerName }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Source Type</span><span class="detail-value"><span
              class="src-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(ait.sourceType)">{{ ait.sourceType }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Fiscal Year</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{
            ait.fiscalYear }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-calendar-event-fill"></i><span>Deduction Details</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Deducted By</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{
            ait.deductedBy }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Deduction Date</span><span class="detail-value">{{
            ait.deductionDate }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Deposit Date</span><span class="detail-value">{{
            ait.depositDate || '—' }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Challan No</span><span class="detail-value">{{
            ait.challanNumber || '—' }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Bank Name</span><span class="detail-value">{{
            ait.bankName || '—' }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="ait.attachmentUrl"><span class="detail-label">Attachment</span><span
            class="detail-value">{{ ait.attachmentUrl }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Status</span><span class="detail-value"><span
              class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(ait.status)">{{ ait.status }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="ait.remarks"><span class="detail-label">Remarks</span><span
            class="detail-value">{{ ait.remarks }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/business-registration/pages/business-edit/business-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Business</h4>
    <p>Update business registration details.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading business data...</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.businessName }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-reg">{{ form.businessRegNo }}</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Business Identity -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Business Identity</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Basic business identification</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.businessName" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required readonly">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required readonly">Owner Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.ownerName" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.businessType">
            <option value="">Select Type</option>
            <option *ngFor="let t of businessTypes" [ngValue]="t.id.toString()">{{ t.typeName }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.businessCategory">
            <option value="">Select Category</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of businessCategories" [ngValue]="c.id.toString()">{{ c.categoryName }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: License -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">License & Registration</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Trade license, BIN and dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Trade License No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-journal-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.tradeLicenseNo" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Incorporation Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incorporationDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Registration Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.registrationDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Expiry Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.expiryDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Contact & Location -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Contact & Location</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Contact details and business address</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Email</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.email" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Phone</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.phone" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Division</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-map-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [(ngModel)]="form.divisionId"
            (ngModelChange)="onDivisionChange()">
            <option [ngValue]="undefined">Select Division</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of divisions" [ngValue]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">District</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [(ngModel)]="form.districtId"
            [disabled]="!form.divisionId || districts.length === 0">
            <option [ngValue]="undefined">
              {{ !form.divisionId ? 'Select division first' : districts.length === 0 ? 'Loading...' : 'Select District' }}
            </option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of districts" [ngValue]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Full Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            [(ngModel)]="form.address" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Financial -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Financial & Workforce</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Turnover and employee count</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Annual Turnover (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.annualTurnover" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Number of Employees</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-people-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.numberOfEmployees" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Business</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/business-registration/pages/business-view/business-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Business Details</h4>
    <p>Full business registration information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && business">

  <!-- Business Header Card -->
  <div class="biz-header-card">
    <div class="biz-header-left">
      <div class="biz-icon">
        <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(business.businessCategory)"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="biz-reg-no">{{ business.businessRegNo }}</div>
        <div class="biz-name">{{ business.businessName }}</div>
        <div class="biz-meta">
          <span class="biz-type-pill">{{ getTypeName(business.businessType) }}</span>
          <span class="biz-cat-pill">{{ getCategoryName(business.businessCategory) }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(business.status)">
            {{ business.status }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="biz-header-right">
      <div class="biz-stat">
        <span class="bs-label">Annual Turnover</span>
        <span class="bs-value">{{ formatCurrency(business.annualTurnover) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="biz-stat">
        <span class="bs-label">Employees</span>
        <span class="bs-value">{{ business.numberOfEmployees ?? 0 }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <!-- Business Information -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
        <span>Business Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Business Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ business.businessName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Owner Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ business.ownerName || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">TIN Number</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="code-badge">{{ business.tinNumber }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Business Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ getTypeName(business.businessType) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Category</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ getCategoryName(business.businessCategory) }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- License & Registration -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill"></i>
        <span>License & Registration</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Reg No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="code-badge purple">{{ business.businessRegNo }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="business.tradeLicenseNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Trade License</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="code-badge">{{ business.tradeLicenseNo }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="business.binNo">
          <span class="detail-label">BIN No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="code-badge">{{ business.binNo }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Incorporation</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ business.incorporationDate || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Registration</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ business.registrationDate || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Expiry</span>
          <span class="detail-value" [class]="isExpired(business.expiryDate!) ? 'expiry-red' : ''">
            {{ business.expiryDate || '—' }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Contact & Location -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
        <span>Contact & Location</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="business.email">
          <span class="detail-label">Email</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ business.email }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Phone</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ business.phone || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Division</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ getDivisionName() }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">District</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ getDistrictName() }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="business.address">
          <span class="detail-label">Address</span>
          <span class="detail-value address-val">{{ business.address }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Financial & Workforce -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i>
        <span>Financial & Workforce</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Annual Turnover</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold turnover">
            {{ formatCurrency(business.annualTurnover) }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Employees</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ business.numberOfEmployees ?? 0 }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(business.status)">
              {{ business.status }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="business.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ business.remarks }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/income-tax-returns/pages/income-tax-return-create/income-tax-return-create.component.css
```css
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ITR FILING WIZARD — Modernized Component CSS
   Design language: Premium SaaS, soft shadows, rounded corners
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
⋮----
/* ── Design tokens ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
:host {
⋮----
--cp:  #FFFFFF;           /* background primary   */
--cs:  #F9FAFB;           /* background secondary - slightly cooler */
--ct:  #F3F4F6;           /* background tertiary  */
--tp:  #111827;           /* text primary - deeper black */
--ts:  #4B5563;           /* text secondary */
--tt:  #9CA3AF;           /* text tertiary  */
--bs:  #E5E7EB;           /* border secondary */
--bt:  #F3F4F6;           /* border tertiary  */
⋮----
/* Modernized Radii */
⋮----
/* Modern Shadows */
⋮----
/* Colors */
⋮----
/* ── Topbar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.itr-topbar {
.topbar-title {
.topbar-meta {
.topbar-right {
⋮----
/* ── Badges ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.badge {
.b-draft  { background: #F3F4F6; color: #4B5563; }
.b-ok     { background: var(--green-bg);  color: var(--green-text); }
.b-warn   { background: var(--amber-bg);  color: var(--amber-text); }
.b-info   { background: var(--blue-bg);   color: var(--blue-dark);  }
.b-red    { background: var(--red-bg);    color: var(--red-text);   }
⋮----
/* ── Step Rail ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.step-rail {
.step-item {
.step-item:hover {
.step-circle {
.s-done .step-circle {
.s-active .step-circle {
.s-todo .step-circle {
.step-label {
.s-active .step-label { color: var(--blue-dark); font-weight: 600; }
.s-done   .step-label { color: var(--green-text); font-weight: 600; }
.step-line {
.step-line.done { background: var(--green-text); }
⋮----
/* ── Card ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.card {
.card:hover {
.card-hdr {
.card-hdr-left {
.hdr-icon {
.ic-blue   { background: var(--blue-bg); color: var(--blue-text); }
.ic-green  { background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green-text); }
.ic-amber  { background: var(--amber-bg); color: var(--amber-text); }
.ic-purple { background: var(--purple-bg); color: var(--purple-text); }
.ic-red    { background: var(--red-bg); color: var(--red-text); }
⋮----
.card-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--tp); }
.card-sub   { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ts); margin-top: 2px; }
.card-p     { padding: 20px; }
⋮----
/* ── Grid layouts ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.grid2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
.grid3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
⋮----
/* ── Field ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.field {
.field label {
.field label .req { color: var(--red-text); margin-left: 2px; }
⋮----
.field input,
.field input:hover,
.field input:focus,
.field input[readonly] {
.field .hint     { font-size: 12px; color: var(--tt); line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 2px; }
.field .autofill { font-size: 12px; color: var(--green-text); font-weight: 500; margin-top: 2px; }
.field .computed { font-size: 12px; color: var(--blue-text); font-weight: 600; margin-top: 2px; }
⋮----
/* ── Alert ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.alert {
.alert-info { background: var(--blue-bg); color: var(--blue-dark); border-color: #DBEAFE; }
.alert-warn { background: var(--amber-bg); color: #92400E; border-color: #FEF3C7; }
.alert-ok   { background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green-text); border-color: #D1FAE5; }
⋮----
/* ── Buttons ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn {
.btn:hover:not(:disabled) {
.btn:active:not(:disabled) {
.btn-primary {
.btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) {
.btn-ghost  {
.btn-ghost:hover:not(:disabled) {
.btn-sm     { padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 13px; }
.btn:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; box-shadow: none; }
⋮----
/* ── Card footer ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.footer {
⋮----
/* ── Taxpayer search ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.search-row {
.search-field-wrap {
.search-icon {
.search-input {
.search-input:focus {
.search-input:disabled { background: var(--cs); color: var(--ts); }
.clear-btn {
.clear-btn:hover { background: #D1D5DB; color: var(--tp); }
⋮----
.search-results {
.result-item {
.result-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.result-item:hover { background: var(--cs); }
.result-avatar {
.result-info { flex: 1; }
.result-name { font-size: 14px; color: var(--tp); font-weight: 600; }
.result-meta { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ts); margin-top: 3px; }
⋮----
/* ── Income table ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.income-table {
.income-table th {
.income-table td {
.income-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
.income-table td.computed { color: var(--blue-text); font-weight: 600; }
.income-table td.muted    { color: var(--tt); }
.income-table tr.section-row td {
.income-table tr.sub-total td {
.income-table tr.grand-total td {
.income-table tr.grand-total td.big {
.table-input {
.table-input:hover {
.table-input:focus {
.table-input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
⋮----
/* ── Deduction rows ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.deduction-row {
.deduction-row:last-of-type { border-bottom: none; }
.ded-left   { flex: 1; }
.ded-name   { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--tp); }
.ded-hint   { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ts); margin-top: 4px; }
.ded-input  {
.ded-input:focus {
.ded-input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
⋮----
.ded-summary {
.ded-sum-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--ts); }
.ded-sum-value { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 4px; }
.ded-sum-value.blue  { color: var(--blue-text); }
.ded-sum-value.green { color: var(--green-text); }
⋮----
/* ── Summary box (step 4) ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.summary-box {
.sum-row {
.sum-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.sum-key  { color: var(--ts); font-weight: 500; }
.sum-val  { font-weight: 600; color: var(--tp); }
.sum-total {
.sum-total .sum-key { color: var(--tp); font-weight: 700; }
.sum-total.sum-refund .sum-val { color: var(--green-text) !important; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; }
.sum-total.sum-due   .sum-val  { color: var(--red-text) !important; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; }
⋮----
.result-msg {
.result-ok   { background: var(--green-bg); color: #14532D; border-color: #D1FAE5; }
.result-warn { background: var(--red-bg);   color: #7F1D1D; border-color: #FEE2E2; }
⋮----
/* ── Tax bracket table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tax-bracket {
.bracket-hdr {
.bracket-row {
.bracket-row:last-child  { border-bottom: none; }
.bracket-row.active      { background: var(--blue-bg); color: var(--blue-dark); font-weight: 600; }
.bracket-row .amount     { color: var(--tp); font-weight: 500; }
.bracket-row.active .amount { color: var(--blue-dark); font-weight: 600; }
⋮----
/* ── Assets total bar ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.assets-total-bar {
.assets-total-value {
⋮----
/* ── Review detail ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.review-detail {
.review-row {
.review-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.rew-k      { color: var(--ts); font-weight: 500; }
.rew-v      { font-weight: 600; color: var(--tp); }
.font-bold  { font-weight: 800 !important; }
⋮----
/* ── Stat boxes (review step) ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.stat-box {
.stat-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ts); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
.stat-value { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--tp); margin-top: 6px; }
.stat-green { background: var(--green-bg); border-color: #BBF7D0; }
.stat-green .stat-label { color: var(--green-text); }
.stat-green .stat-value { color: var(--green-text); }
.stat-red   { background: var(--red-bg); border-color: #FECACA; }
.stat-red   .stat-label { color: var(--red-text); }
.stat-red   .stat-value { color: var(--red-text); }
⋮----
/* ── Declaration box ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.declaration-box {
.decl-title  { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--tp); margin-bottom: 8px; }
.decl-body   {
.decl-check  {
.decl-check input {
⋮----
.remarks-input {
.remarks-input:focus {
⋮----
/* ── Success screen ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.success-screen {
.success-icon {
.success-title {
.success-sub {
.ack-box {
.ack-row {
.ack-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.ack-val { font-weight: 600; color: var(--tp); }
.mono    { font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 13px; color: var(--blue-dark); background: var(--blue-bg); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; }
.success-actions {
⋮----
/* ── Payment method buttons ── */
.payment-method-btn {
⋮----
.payment-method-btn:hover:not(.disabled) {
⋮----
.payment-method-btn.selected {
⋮----
.payment-method-btn.disabled {
⋮----
/* ── Payment fields container ── */
.payment-fields {
⋮----
.itr-topbar,
⋮----
body * { visibility: hidden; }
#print-area,
⋮----
#print-area {
⋮----
/* ── Responsive ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.grid2, .grid3 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.itr-topbar    { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
.step-label    { display: none; }
.bracket-hdr,
.footer        { gap: 12px; flex-direction: column-reverse; }
.footer .btn   { width: 100%; justify-content: center; }
.ded-input     { width: 100px; }
.deduction-row { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; }
.ded-input     { width: 100%; text-align: left; }
```
