## File: src/app/features/taxpayer-management/pages/taxpayer-edit/taxpayer-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Taxpayer</h4>
    <p>Update taxpayer profile information.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading taxpayer data...</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <form [formGroup]="taxpayerForm" (ngSubmit)="onSubmit()">

    <div class="edit-banner">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
      Editing: <strong>{{ isCompanyOrOrg ? taxpayerForm.get('companyName')?.value : taxpayerForm.get('fullName')?.value
        }}</strong>
      <span class="banner-tin" *ngIf="taxpayerForm.get('tinNumber')?.value">{{ taxpayerForm.get('tinNumber')?.value
        }}</span>
    </div>

    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon">
          <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Identity</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Basic taxpayer identification information</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Type</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="taxpayerType">
              <option *ngFor="let type of taxpayerTypes" [ngValue]="type">{{ type.typeName }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Registration Date</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="registrationDate" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <ng-container *ngIf="isIndividual">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Full Name</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="fullName" />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">National ID (NID)</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-card-text input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="nid" />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Father's Name</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-person-badge input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="fathersName" />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Mother's Name</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-person-badge input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="mothersName" />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Date of Birth</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
              <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="dateOfBirth" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Gender -->
          <div class="form-group" *ngIf="isIndividual">
            <label class="form-label">Gender</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-gender-ambiguous input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="gender">
                <option value="">Select gender</option>
                <option value="Male">Male</option>
                <option value="Female">Female</option>
                <option value="Other">Other</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Profession</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="profession" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </ng-container>

        <!-- Both Business and Organization -->
        <ng-container *ngIf="isCompanyOrOrg">

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Organization / Company Name</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Enter name" formControlName="companyName" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Nature of Business / Activity</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. IT, Garments, Charity"
                formControlName="natureOfBusiness" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Business-only fields -->
          <ng-container *ngIf="isBusiness">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label required">Trade License No</label>
              <div class="input-wrap">
                <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
                <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Trade license" formControlName="tradeLicenseNo" />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label required">RJSC No</label>
              <div class="input-wrap">
                <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-medical input-icon"></i>
                <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="RJSC number" formControlName="rjscNo" />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label required">Incorporation Date</label>
              <div class="input-wrap">
                <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
                <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="incorporationDate" />
              </div>
            </div>
          </ng-container>

          <!-- Auth person — all company/org types -->
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Auth. Person Name</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-person-check-fill input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Representative name"
                formControlName="authorizedPersonName" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Auth. Person NID</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-card-text input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Representative NID"
                formControlName="authorizedPersonNid" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Designation</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-person-vcard input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. Managing Director"
                formControlName="authorizedPersonDesignation" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </ng-container>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon teal">
          <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Contact Information</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Email, phone and address details</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Email Address</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="email" class="form-input" formControlName="email" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Phone Number</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-phone-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="phone" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="mt-4" formGroupName="presentAddress">
        <p class="form-label fw-bold mb-2">Present / Registered Address</p>
        <div class="form-grid">
          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-map input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="division">
                <option value="" disabled>Select Division</option>
                <option *ngFor="let div of divisions" [value]="div.name">{{ div.name }}</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-geo input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="district">
                <option value="" disabled>Select District</option>
                <option *ngFor="let dist of presentDistricts" [value]="dist.name">{{ dist.name }}</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-geo-alt input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Thana" formControlName="thana" />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-house input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Road / Village" formControlName="roadVillage" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="mt-3 mb-3">
        <label
          style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; color: #1a3f8f;">
          <input type="checkbox" formControlName="sameAsPermanent" />
          Permanent Address is same as Present Address
        </label>
      </div>

      <div formGroupName="permanentAddress" *ngIf="!taxpayerForm.get('sameAsPermanent')?.value">
        <p class="form-label fw-bold mb-2">Permanent Address</p>
        <div class="form-grid">
          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-map input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="division">
                <option value="" disabled>Select Division</option>
                <option *ngFor="let div of divisions" [value]="div.name">{{ div.name }}</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-geo input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="district">
                <option value="" disabled>Select District</option>
                <option *ngFor="let dist of permanentDistricts" [value]="dist.name">{{ dist.name }}</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-geo-alt input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Thana" formControlName="thana" />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-house input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Road / Village" formControlName="roadVillage" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <!-- Photo Upload Section -->
   <div class="form-section">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-icon purple">
      <i class="bi bi-camera-fill"></i>
    </div>
    <div>
      <h6 class="section-title">Profile Photo</h6>
      <span class="section-sub">Upload a clear photo (max 5MB, JPG/PNG)</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="photo-upload-area">

      <!-- Current / Preview photo -->
      <div class="photo-display">
        <img *ngIf="photoPreview" [src]="photoPreview" class="photo-img" alt="Preview"/>
        <img *ngIf="!photoPreview && currentPhotoUrl" 
            [src]="currentPhotoUrl" 
            class="photo-img" 
            alt="Current photo"/>
        <div class="photo-placeholder" *ngIf="!photoPreview && !currentPhotoUrl">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Upload controls -->
      <div class="photo-controls">
        <div class="photo-status" *ngIf="currentPhotoUrl && !photoPreview">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success"></i>
          Photo uploaded
        </div>
        <div class="photo-status pending" *ngIf="photoPreview">
          <i class="bi bi-clock-fill"></i>
          New photo selected — click Upload to save
        </div>
        <div class="photo-status missing" *ngIf="!currentPhotoUrl && !photoPreview">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-circle-fill"></i>
          No photo uploaded
        </div>

        <div class="photo-btn-row">
          <label class="btn-select-photo">
            <i class="bi bi-image"></i>
            {{ currentPhotoUrl ? 'Change Photo' : 'Select Photo' }}
            <input type="file" 
                  accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/jpg"
                  (change)="onFileSelected($event)"
                  style="display:none"/>
          </label>

          <button type="button"
                  class="btn-upload-photo"
                  *ngIf="selectedFile"
                  (click)="uploadPhoto()"
                  [disabled]="isUploadingPhoto">
            <i class="bi" [ngClass]="isUploadingPhoto ? 'bi-hourglass-split' : 'bi-cloud-upload-fill'"></i>
            {{ isUploadingPhoto ? 'Uploading...' : 'Upload' }}
          </button>

          <button type="button"
                  class="btn-cancel-photo"
                  *ngIf="selectedFile"
                  (click)="removePhoto()">
            <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
            Cancel
          </button>
        </div>

        <div class="photo-hint">
          Accepted formats: JPG, PNG · Max size: 5MB
        </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon orange">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Account Status</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Set the taxpayer account status</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Status</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="status">
              <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Status Preview</label>
          <div class="status-preview">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="{
              'status-active':    taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Active',
              'status-inactive':  taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Inactive',
              'status-pending':   taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Pending',
              'status-suspended': taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Suspended'
            }">{{ taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value }}</span>
            <span class="status-hint" style="font-size: 11px; margin-left: 8px; color: #666;">
              <ng-container *ngIf="taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Active'">Taxpayer can file returns and make
                payments.</ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngIf="taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Inactive'">Taxpayer account is currently
                inactive.</ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngIf="taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Pending'">Taxpayer is awaiting
                verification.</ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngIf="taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Suspended'">Taxpayer account has been
                suspended.</ng-container>
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-actions">
      <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
      </button>
      <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" [disabled]="isSaving || taxpayerForm.invalid">
        <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Profile</span>
        <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </form>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/tin-management/pages/tin-create/tin-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Issue TIN</h4>
    <p>Issue a new Taxpayer Identification Number.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon search-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Find Taxpayer</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Search by NID or name — details will auto-fill</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="search-row">
      <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill input-icon"></i>
        <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Enter NID number or taxpayer name..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchQuery" (ngModelChange)="onSearchInput()" (keyup.enter)="searchTaxpayer()"
          [disabled]="isAutoFilled" />
        <button *ngIf="isAutoFilled" class="clear-btn" (click)="clearSelectedTaxpayer()">
          <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
      <button class="btn-search" (click)="searchTaxpayer()" [disabled]="isSearching || isAutoFilled">
        <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
        <span *ngIf="isSearching"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Searching...</span>
      </button>
    </div>

    <div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
      <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let t of searchResults" (click)="selectTaxpayer(t)">
        <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
        <div class="result-info">
          <span class="result-name">{{ getDisplayName(t) }}</span>
          <span class="result-meta">
            <span *ngIf="t.taxpayerType.typeName === 'Company'" class="me-2 fw-bold text-primary">Company</span>
            <span *ngIf="t.taxpayerType.typeName !== 'Company' && t.nid">NID: {{ t.nid }}</span>
            <span *ngIf="t.phone"> · {{ t.phone }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <span class="result-badge">Select</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="hasSearched && searchResults.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> No taxpayer found. Fill in details below manually.
    </div>

    <div class="selected-card" *ngIf="isAutoFilled && selectedTaxpayer">
      <div class="selected-card-left">
        <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i></div>
        <div>
          <p class="selected-name">{{ getDisplayName(selectedTaxpayer) }}</p>
          <p class="selected-meta">
            <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.taxpayerType.typeName === 'Company'" class="fw-bold me-1">Company</span>
            <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.taxpayerType.typeName !== 'Company' && selectedTaxpayer.nid">NID: {{
              selectedTaxpayer.nid }}</span>
            <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.phone"> · {{ selectedTaxpayer.phone }}</span>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="autofill-tag"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Auto-filled</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Name, category and identification</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            [value]="selectedTaxpayer ? getDisplayName(selectedTaxpayer) : ''"
            placeholder="Auto-filled from taxpayer search above"
            readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
        <span class="field-hint" *ngIf="!selectedTaxpayer">Search and select a taxpayer above first.</span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.tinCategory" [disabled]="isAutoFilled">
            <option value="">Select Category</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of tinCategories" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
          </select>
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Issue Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.issuedDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <ng-container *ngIf="isIndividual">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">National ID</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled && form.nid">
            <i class="bi bi-card-text input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="10/13/17 digit NID" [(ngModel)]="form.nid"
              [disabled]="isAutoFilled && !!form.nid" />
            <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled && form.nid"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Passport No.</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-passport input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Optional" [(ngModel)]="form.passportNo" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Date of Birth</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled && form.dateOfBirth">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.dateOfBirth"
              [disabled]="isAutoFilled && !!form.dateOfBirth" />
            <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled && form.dateOfBirth"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </ng-container>

      <div class="form-group" *ngIf="isCompany">
        <label class="form-label">Incorporation Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled && form.incorporationDate">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incorporationDate"
            [disabled]="isAutoFilled && !!form.incorporationDate" />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled && form.incorporationDate"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Location & Tax Authority</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Select division → district → tax zone → tax circle</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Division</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-map-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="selectedDivisionId" (ngModelChange)="onDivisionChange()">
            <option [ngValue]="null">Select Division</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of divisions" [ngValue]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">District</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-fill input-icon"></i>
          <span *ngIf="loadingDistricts" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm dropdown-spinner"></span>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.district" (ngModelChange)="onDistrictChange()"
            [disabled]="!selectedDivisionId || loadingDistricts">
            <option value="">Select District</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of districts" [value]="d.name">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Zone</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
          <span *ngIf="loadingZones" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm dropdown-spinner"></span>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.taxZone" (ngModelChange)="onZoneChange()"
            [disabled]="!form.district || loadingZones">
            <option value="">Select Tax Zone</option>
            <option *ngFor="let z of taxZones" [value]="z.name">{{ z.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <span class="field-hint" *ngIf="form.district && taxZones.length === 0 && !loadingZones">
          No zones found for {{ form.district }}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Circle</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-circle-fill input-icon"></i>
          <span *ngIf="loadingCircles" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm dropdown-spinner"></span>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.taxCircle"
            [disabled]="!form.taxZone || loadingCircles">
            <option value="">Select Tax Circle</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of taxCircles" [value]="c.name">{{ c.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Email</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled && form.email">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input" placeholder="Enter email" [(ngModel)]="form.email"
            [disabled]="isAutoFilled && !!form.email" />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled && form.email"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Phone</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled && form.phone">
          <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="01xxx-xxxxxx" [(ngModel)]="form.phone"
            [disabled]="isAutoFilled && !!form.phone" />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled && form.phone"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled && form.address">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Enter full address..." [(ngModel)]="form.address"
            [disabled]="isAutoFilled && !!form.address" rows="2"></textarea>
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon textarea-lock" *ngIf="isAutoFilled && form.address"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Optional notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Optional remarks..." [(ngModel)]="form.remarks"
            rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-upc-scan"></i> Issue TIN</span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Issuing...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/tin-management/pages/tin-list/tin-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>TIN Management</h4>
    <p>Manage all Taxpayer Identification Numbers.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" (click)="navigateToCreate()" class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Issue TIN
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by TIN, name, category, zone, district..." [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn btn-export" (click)="onExport()" [disabled]="isExporting">
        <i class="bi" [ngClass]="isExporting ? 'bi-hourglass-split spin' : 'bi-file-earmark-excel'"></i> 
        {{ isExporting ? 'Exporting...' : 'Export to CSV' }}
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading TIN records...</span>
  </div>

  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>TIN Number</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Category</th>
          <th>ID Ref. (NID/Inc.)</th>
          <th>Tax Zone</th>
          <th>Tax Circle</th>
          <th>District</th>
          <th>Issued Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let t of filteredTins; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td><span class="tin-code">{{ t.tinNumber }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar tin-avatar">
                <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(t.tinCategory)"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ t.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ t.email || t.phone }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getCategoryClass(t.tinCategory)">
              <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(t.tinCategory)"></i>
              {{ t.tinCategory }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="code-sm" *ngIf="t.nid">{{ t.nid }}</span>
            <span class="code-sm" *ngIf="!t.nid && t.passportNo">{{ t.passportNo }}</span>
            <span class="code-sm" *ngIf="!t.nid && !t.passportNo && t.incorporationDate">Inc: {{ t.incorporationDate |
              date:'shortDate' }}</span>
            <span class="text-muted" *ngIf="!t.nid && !t.passportNo && !t.incorporationDate">—</span>
          </td>

          <td><span class="zone-badge">{{ t.taxZone }}</span></td>
          <td><span class="circle-badge">{{ t.taxCircle }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ t.district }}</td>
          <td>{{ t.issuedDate | date:'mediumDate' }}</td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(t.status)">
              {{ t.status }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(t.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(t.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(t.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="filteredTins.length === 0">
          <td colspan="11">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-upc-scan"></i>
              <p>No TIN records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let t of filteredTins">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar tin-avatar">
            <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(t.tinCategory)"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ t.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ t.tinNumber }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(t.status)">{{ t.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Category</label>
          <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getCategoryClass(t.tinCategory)">{{ t.tinCategory }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="t.nid"><label>NID</label><span>{{ t.nid }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="!t.nid && t.incorporationDate"><label>Inc. Date</label><span>{{
            t.incorporationDate | date:'shortDate' }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Zone</label><span>{{ t.taxZone }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Circle</label><span>{{ t.taxCircle }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>District</label><span>{{ t.district }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Phone</label><span>{{ t.phone }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Issued</label><span>{{ t.issuedDate | date:'mediumDate' }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(t.id)"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View</button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(t.id)"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(t.id)"><i
            class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i></button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredTins.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-upc-scan"></i>
      <p>No TIN records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" (click)="navigateToCreate()">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete TIN Record?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this TIN record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/tin-management/pages/tin-view/tin-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>TIN Details</h4>
    <p>Full TIN record information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="d-flex justify-content-end mb-3">
    <button class="btn btn-outline-success d-flex align-items-center gap-2"
      (click)="onDownloadCertificate(tin!.id, tin!.tinNumber)" [disabled]="isDownloading">

      <i class="bi"
        [ngClass]="isDownloading ? 'bi-arrow-repeat spinner-border spinner-border-sm' : 'bi-file-earmark-pdf-fill'"></i>

      <span>{{ isDownloading ? 'Downloading...' : 'Download Certificate' }}</span>
    </button>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && tin">

  <div class="tin-header-card">
    <div class="tin-header-left">
      <div class="tin-icon">
        <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(tin.tinCategory)"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="tin-number">{{ tin.tinNumber }}</div>
        <div class="tin-name">{{ tin.taxpayerName }}</div>
        <div class="tin-meta">
          <span class="tin-cat-pill">{{ tin.tinCategory }}</span>
          <span class="tin-zone-pill">{{ tin.taxZone }}</span>
          <span class="tin-circle-pill">{{ tin.taxCircle }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(tin.status)">
            {{ tin.status }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="tin-header-right">
      <div class="tin-stat">
        <span class="ts-label">Issued Date</span>
        <span class="ts-value">{{ tin.issuedDate | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="tin-stat" *ngIf="tin.lastUpdated">
        <span class="ts-label">Last Updated</span>
        <span class="ts-value">{{ tin.lastUpdated | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="details-grid">

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
        <span>Taxpayer Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">TIN Number</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge cyan">{{ tin.tinNumber }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Full Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ tin.taxpayerName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Category</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tin.tinCategory }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="tin.nid">
          <span class="detail-label">National ID</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ tin.nid }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="tin.passportNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Passport No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ tin.passportNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="tin.dateOfBirth">
          <span class="detail-label">Date of Birth</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tin.dateOfBirth | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="tin.gender">
          <span class="detail-label">Gender</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tin.gender }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="tin.incorporationDate">
          <span class="detail-label">Incorporation Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tin.incorporationDate | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i>
        <span>Tax Authority</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Zone</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="zone-badge">{{ tin.taxZone }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Circle</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="circle-badge">{{ tin.taxCircle }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(tin.status)">
              {{ tin.status }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="tin.issuedDate">
          <span class="detail-label">Issued Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tin.issuedDate | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="tin.lastUpdated">
          <span class="detail-label">Last Updated</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tin.lastUpdated | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
        <span>Contact & Location</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="tin.email">
          <span class="detail-label">Email</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tin.email }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Phone</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tin.phone }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Division</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tin.division }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">District</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tin.district }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="tin.address">
          <span class="detail-label">Address</span>
          <span class="detail-value address-val">{{ tin.address }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="tin.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ tin.remarks }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/pages/vat-registration-create/vat-registration-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Register for VAT</h4>
    <p>Complete all three steps to register a business for VAT.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" type="button" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<!-- ══ Wizard ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="wizard-steps">
  <div class="wizard-step" [class.active]="currentStep === 1" [class.done]="currentStep > 1">
    <div class="ws-circle">
      <i class="bi bi-check-lg" *ngIf="currentStep > 1"></i>
      <span *ngIf="currentStep <= 1">1</span>
    </div>
    <span class="ws-label">Taxpayer</span>
  </div>
  <div class="wizard-connector" [class.done]="currentStep > 1"></div>

  <div class="wizard-step"
       [class.active]="currentStep === 2" [class.done]="currentStep > 2"
       [class.skipped]="isCompany && currentStep > 1">
    <div class="ws-circle">
      <i class="bi bi-check-lg"          *ngIf="currentStep > 2"></i>
      <i class="bi bi-skip-forward-fill" *ngIf="isCompany && currentStep > 1 && currentStep <= 2"></i>
      <span *ngIf="currentStep <= 2 && !isCompany">2</span>
      <span *ngIf="isCompany && currentStep === 1">2</span>
    </div>
    <span class="ws-label">{{ isCompany && currentStep > 1 ? 'Skipped' : 'Business' }}</span>
  </div>
  <div class="wizard-connector" [class.done]="currentStep > 2"></div>

  <div class="wizard-step" [class.active]="currentStep === 3">
    <div class="ws-circle"><span>3</span></div>
    <span class="ws-label">VAT Details</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Draft banner -->
  <div class="draft-banner" *ngIf="showDraftBanner">
    <div class="draft-banner-left">
      <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i>
      <div>
        <strong>Unsaved draft found</strong>
        <span>Saved {{ draftSavedAt }} — continue where you left off (documents must be re-attached).</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="draft-banner-actions">
      <button type="button" class="draft-btn-continue" (click)="dismissDraft()">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle-fill"></i> Continue draft
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="draft-btn-discard" (click)="discardDraft()">Start fresh</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ STEP 1 — Taxpayer ═════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <div class="form-section" *ngIf="currentStep === 1 || stepOneComplete">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon" [class.green]="stepOneComplete">
        <i class="bi bi-person-search"     *ngIf="!stepOneComplete"></i>
        <i class="bi bi-person-check-fill" *ngIf="stepOneComplete"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Step 1 — Find Taxpayer</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Search by TIN, NID, or name</span>
      </div>
      <button *ngIf="stepOneComplete && currentStep > 1" type="button"
        class="btn-edit-step" (click)="onTaxpayerCleared()">
        <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Change
      </button>
    </div>
    <app-taxpayer-search
      [selectedTaxpayer]="selectedTaxpayer"
      (taxpayerSelected)="onTaxpayerSelected($event)"
      (taxpayerCleared)="onTaxpayerCleared()">
    </app-taxpayer-search>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ STEP 2 — Business Picker ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="stepOneComplete && !isCompany">
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon" [class.green]="stepTwoComplete"><i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i></div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Step 2 — Select Business</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Choose which business to register for VAT</span>
        </div>
        <button *ngIf="selectedBusiness && currentStep === 3" type="button"
          class="btn-edit-step" (click)="currentStep = 2; selectedBusiness = null">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Change
        </button>
      </div>
      <app-business-picker
        [businesses]="businesses" [loading]="loadingBusinesses" [selected]="selectedBusiness"
        (businessSelected)="onBusinessSelected($event)">
      </app-business-picker>
    </div>
  </ng-container>

  <!-- Company notice -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="isCompany && currentStep === 3">
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="company-notice">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
        <span>
          <strong>Company taxpayer</strong> — VAT is being registered directly against
          <strong>{{ selectedTaxpayer?.companyName }}</strong> without a separate business record.
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </ng-container>

  <!-- ══ STEP 3 — VAT Details ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="currentStep === 3">
    <form [formGroup]="form" novalidate>

      <div class="section-divider"></div>

      <!-- ── 3a: VAT Authority ─────────────────────────────────────────── -->
      <div class="form-section">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
          <div>
            <h6 class="section-title">VAT Authority &amp; Jurisdiction</h6>
            <span class="section-sub">Division and District are auto-filled — select Zone and Circle</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-grid">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Division <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
            <div class="input-wrap locked">
              <i class="bi bi-map-fill input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="divisionId">
                <option [value]="null">—</option>
                <option *ngFor="let d of divisions" [value]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
              </select>
              <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">District <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
            <div class="input-wrap locked">
              <i class="bi bi-geo-fill input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="districtId">
                <option [value]="null">{{ loadingDistricts ? 'Loading…' : '—' }}</option>
                <option *ngFor="let d of districts" [value]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
              </select>
              <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">VAT Zone</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="vatZoneId"
                [class.is-invalid]="ctrl('vatZoneId')?.invalid && ctrl('vatZoneId')?.touched">
                <option [value]="null">{{ loadingZones ? 'Loading zones…' : vatZones.length === 0 ? 'Select a district first' : 'Select Zone' }}</option>
                <option *ngFor="let z of vatZones" [value]="z.id">{{ z.name }}</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <span class="field-error-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('vatZoneId')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('vatZoneId')?.touched">VAT zone is required.</span>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">VAT Circle</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-circle-fill input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="vatCircleId"
                [attr.disabled]="!ctrl('vatZoneId')?.value ? true : null"
                [class.is-invalid]="ctrl('vatCircleId')?.invalid && ctrl('vatCircleId')?.touched">
                <option [value]="null">{{ loadingCircles ? 'Loading circles…' : 'Select Circle' }}</option>
                <option *ngFor="let c of vatCircles" [value]="c.id">{{ c.name }}</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <span class="field-error-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('vatCircleId')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('vatCircleId')?.touched">VAT circle is required.</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-divider"></div>

      <!-- ── 3b: Business details (auto-filled) ───────────────────────── -->
      <div class="form-section" *ngIf="selectedBusiness">
        <div class="verified-notice">
          <i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill"></i>
          <span>Your business <strong>{{ selectedBusiness.businessName }}</strong> has been verified. Fill in VAT-specific details below to generate your BIN.</span>
        </div>
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <h6 class="section-title">Business Details <span class="auto-label">Auto-filled</span></h6>
            <span class="section-sub">Read-only — sourced from the business record.
              <a [routerLink]="['/businesses/edit', editBusinessId]" class="update-link ms-1">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Request Update</a></span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-grid">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Business Name <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
            <div class="input-wrap locked">
              <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="autoBusinessName" readonly />
              <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Owner Name <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
            <div class="input-wrap locked">
              <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="selectedBusiness.ownerName" readonly />
              <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Trade License No. <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
            <div class="input-wrap locked">
              <i class="bi bi-journal-text input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="selectedBusiness.tradeLicenseNo" readonly />
              <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Phone <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
            <div class="input-wrap locked">
              <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="selectedBusiness.phone" readonly />
              <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group full-width">
            <label class="form-label">Address <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
            <div class="input-wrap locked">
              <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
              <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" rows="2" readonly [value]="selectedBusiness.address || ''"></textarea>
              <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" style="top:12px;align-self:flex-start"></i>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Company auto-fill -->
      <ng-container *ngIf="isCompany">
        <div class="section-divider"></div>
        <div class="form-section">
          <div class="form-grid">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label">Company Name <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
              <div class="input-wrap locked">
                <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
                <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="selectedTaxpayer?.companyName || ''" readonly />
                <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label">TIN Number <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
              <div class="input-wrap locked">
                <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
                <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="selectedTaxpayer?.tinNumber || ''" readonly />
                <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </ng-container>

      <div class="section-divider"></div>

      <!-- ── 3c: VAT Category & Turnover ──────────────────────────────── -->
      <div class="form-section">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon orange"><i class="bi bi-tag-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <h6 class="section-title">VAT Category &amp; Turnover</h6>
            <span class="section-sub">Select the applicable VAT scheme for this business</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Radio cards -->
        <div class="form-group full-width" style="margin-bottom:16px;">
          <label class="form-label required">VAT Category</label>
          <div class="radio-group" role="radiogroup">
            <label class="radio-opt" *ngFor="let cat of vatCategoryOptions"
              [class.selected]="ctrl('vatCategory')?.value === cat.value">
              <input type="radio" class="radio-input-hidden" formControlName="vatCategory" [value]="cat.value" />
              <div class="radio-dot"><div class="radio-dot-inner"></div></div>
              <span class="radio-opt-label">{{ cat.label }}</span>
            </label>
          </div>
          <span class="field-error-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('vatCategory')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('vatCategory')?.touched">VAT category is required.</span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-grid">
          <!-- Annual Turnover — locked for non-company -->
          <div class="form-group" *ngIf="selectedBusiness">
            <label class="form-label">Annual Turnover (BDT) <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
            <div class="input-prefix locked">
              <span class="prefix-symbol">৳</span>
              <input type="text" class="form-input prefix-input"
                [value]="formatTurnoverDisplay(selectedBusiness.annualTurnover)" readonly />
            </div>
            <span class="field-hint">Sourced from the business registration record</span>
          </div>

          <!-- Annual Turnover — editable for company taxpayers -->
          <div class="form-group" *ngIf="isCompany">
            <label class="form-label required">Annual Turnover (BDT)</label>
            <div class="input-prefix">
              <span class="prefix-symbol">৳</span>
              <input type="number" class="form-input prefix-input" formControlName="annualTurnover" placeholder="0" min="0" />
            </div>
            <span class="field-hint">Must exceed ৳30 lakh for mandatory registration</span>
          </div>

          <!-- Return period -->
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">VAT Return Period</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-calendar-week input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="returnPeriod">
                <option value="Monthly">Monthly</option>
                <option value="Quarterly">Quarterly</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-divider"></div>

      <!-- ── 3d: Dates ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
      <div class="form-section">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#6d28d9);color:#fff;">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3-range"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <h6 class="section-title">Registration Dates</h6>
            <span class="section-sub">Set registration and effective dates</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-grid">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Registration Date</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
              <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="registrationDate" />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Effective Date</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
              <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="effectiveDate"
                [class.is-invalid]="ctrl('effectiveDate')?.errors?.['beforeRegistration'] && ctrl('effectiveDate')?.touched" />
            </div>
            <span class="field-hint">Date from which VAT obligation starts</span>
            <span class="field-error-msg"
              *ngIf="ctrl('effectiveDate')?.errors?.['beforeRegistration'] && ctrl('effectiveDate')?.touched">
              Effective date cannot be earlier than the registration date.
            </span>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Expiry Date <span class="optional">(optional)</span></label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
              <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="expiryDate" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-divider"></div>

      <!-- ── 3e: Supporting Documents ──────────────────────────────────── -->
      <div class="form-section">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0891b2,#0e7490);color:#fff;">
            <i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <h6 class="section-title">
              Supporting Documents
              <span class="optional">(optional)</span>
              <span class="upload-count-badge" *ngIf="uploadCount > 0">
                {{ uploadCount }} / {{ documentFields.length }} uploaded
              </span>
            </h6>
            <span class="section-sub">PDF, JPG, or PNG — max 5 MB per file</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="doc-upload-list">
          <div class="doc-upload-row" *ngFor="let doc of documentFields">

            <!-- Left: icon + label + status text -->
            <div class="doc-upload-left">
              <div class="doc-icon" [class.uploaded]="isDocUploaded(doc.key)">
                <i class="bi bi-file-check-fill" *ngIf="isDocUploaded(doc.key)"></i>
                <i class="bi bi-file-earmark"    *ngIf="!isDocUploaded(doc.key)"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="doc-info">
                <span class="doc-label">{{ doc.label }}</span>
                <span class="doc-filename" *ngIf="isDocUploaded(doc.key)">
                  {{ uploadedFiles[doc.key]?.name }}
                  <span class="doc-filesize">{{ formatFileSize(uploadedFiles[doc.key]!.size) }}</span>
                </span>
                <span class="doc-hint" *ngIf="!isDocUploaded(doc.key)">{{ doc.hint }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Right: action area -->
            <div class="doc-upload-right">

              <!-- Uploaded: status badge + remove button -->
              <ng-container *ngIf="isDocUploaded(doc.key)">
                <span class="doc-status-uploaded">
                  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Uploaded
                </span>
                <button type="button" class="btn-remove-doc"
                  (click)="removeFile(doc.key)" title="Remove file">
                  <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
                </button>
              </ng-container>

              <!-- Not uploaded: upload button (label triggers hidden input) -->
              <label class="btn-upload-doc" *ngIf="!isDocUploaded(doc.key)">
                <i class="bi bi-upload"></i> Choose File
                <input type="file" class="file-input-hidden"
                  accept=".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png,.webp"
                  (change)="onFileSelected($event, doc.key)" />
              </label>

            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-divider"></div>

      <!-- ── 3f: Remarks ───────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
      <div class="form-section">
        <div class="form-grid">
          <div class="form-group full-width">
            <label class="form-label">Remarks <span class="optional">(optional)</span></label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
              <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" formControlName="remarks"
                placeholder="Optional officer notes…" rows="2"></textarea>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ── Form Actions ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
      <div class="form-actions">
        <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
          <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" (click)="goBack()" [disabled]="isLoading"
          style="border-color:var(--color-border-primary);color:var(--color-accent)">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="btn-submit"
          (click)="onOpenReview()" [disabled]="isLoading || !canSubmit">
          <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> Review &amp; Submit</span>
          <span *ngIf="isLoading">
            <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Registering…
          </span>
        </button>
      </div>

    </form>
  </ng-container>

</div><!-- /form-card -->


<!-- ══ Review Modal ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showReviewModal" (click)="onCloseReview()">
  <div class="modal-card review-modal-card" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">

    <div class="modal-accent"></div>

    <div class="review-modal-header">
      <div class="modal-icon-wrap" style="margin-bottom:0;width:40px;height:40px;flex-shrink:0;">
        <i class="bi bi-clock-history" style="font-size:17px;color:var(--color-accent)"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p class="modal-title" style="text-align:left;margin-bottom:2px;">Review &amp; Confirm</p>
        <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--color-text-secondary);margin:0;">Verify all information before submission</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="review-scroll-body">

      <!-- Business Information -->
      <div class="summary-section">
        <span class="summary-section-label">Business Information</span>
        <div class="summary-row">
          <span class="summary-key">Business name</span>
          <span class="summary-val fw-bold">{{ autoBusinessName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-row">
          <span class="summary-key">TIN</span>
          <span class="summary-val" style="font-family:var(--font-mono)">{{ selectedTaxpayer?.tinNumber }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-row" *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer?.taxpayerType?.typeName">
          <span class="summary-key">Taxpayer type</span>
          <span class="summary-val">{{ selectedTaxpayer?.taxpayerType?.typeName }}</span>
        </div>
        <ng-container *ngIf="selectedBusiness">
          <div class="summary-row" *ngIf="selectedBusiness.ownerName">
            <span class="summary-key">Owner</span>
            <span class="summary-val">{{ selectedBusiness.ownerName }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="summary-row" *ngIf="selectedBusiness.tradeLicenseNo">
            <span class="summary-key">Trade license</span>
            <span class="summary-val" style="font-family:var(--font-mono)">{{ selectedBusiness.tradeLicenseNo }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="summary-row" *ngIf="selectedBusiness.address">
            <span class="summary-key">Address</span>
            <span class="summary-val">{{ selectedBusiness.address }}</span>
          </div>
        </ng-container>
      </div>

      <!-- VAT Details -->
      <div class="summary-section">
        <span class="summary-section-label">VAT Details</span>
        <div class="summary-row">
          <span class="summary-key">Category</span>
          <span class="summary-val">
            <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="{
              'cat-standard': ctrl('vatCategory')?.value === 'Standard',
              'cat-zero':     ctrl('vatCategory')?.value === 'Zero Rated',
              'cat-exempt':   ctrl('vatCategory')?.value === 'Exempt',
              'cat-special':  ctrl('vatCategory')?.value === 'Special'
            }">{{ vatCategoryLabel }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-row" *ngIf="selectedBusiness">
          <span class="summary-key">Annual turnover</span>
          <span class="summary-val" style="color:var(--color-teal);font-weight:700">
            ৳ {{ formatTurnoverDisplay(selectedBusiness.annualTurnover) }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-row">
          <span class="summary-key">VAT Zone</span>
          <span class="summary-val">{{ reviewZoneName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-row">
          <span class="summary-key">VAT Circle</span>
          <span class="summary-val">{{ reviewCircleName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-row">
          <span class="summary-key">District / Division</span>
          <span class="summary-val">{{ reviewDistrictName }}, {{ reviewDivisionName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-row" *ngIf="ctrl('effectiveDate')?.value">
          <span class="summary-key">Effective date</span>
          <span class="summary-val">{{ ctrl('effectiveDate')?.value }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-row">
          <span class="summary-key">Return period</span>
          <span class="summary-val fw-bold">{{ ctrl('returnPeriod')?.value }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-row" *ngIf="ctrl('expiryDate')?.value">
          <span class="summary-key">Expiry date</span>
          <span class="summary-val">{{ ctrl('expiryDate')?.value }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Documents — shows real upload status -->
      <div class="summary-section">
        <span class="summary-section-label">Documents</span>
        <div class="summary-row" *ngFor="let doc of documentFields">
          <span class="summary-key">{{ doc.label }}</span>
          <span class="summary-val doc-status-uploaded" *ngIf="isDocUploaded(doc.key)">
            <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Uploaded
          </span>
          <span class="summary-val doc-pending" *ngIf="!isDocUploaded(doc.key)">
            — Not uploaded
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Remarks -->
      <div class="summary-section" *ngIf="ctrl('remarks')?.value">
        <span class="summary-section-label">Remarks</span>
        <div class="summary-row">
          <span class="summary-val" style="text-align:left;font-weight:400;color:var(--color-text-secondary)">
            {{ ctrl('remarks')?.value }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- Declaration -->
    <div class="review-declaration">
      <label class="declaration-label">
        <input type="checkbox" [(ngModel)]="declarationAccepted" [ngModelOptions]="{ standalone: true }" />
        <span>
          I hereby declare that all information provided is true, accurate, and complete.
          I understand that any false declaration may lead to rejection or legal action under the VAT Act.
        </span>
      </label>
    </div>

    <!-- Actions -->
    <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:0;">
      <button type="button" class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="onCloseReview()" [disabled]="isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="btn-modal-confirm"
        (click)="onConfirmSubmit()" [disabled]="!declarationAccepted || isLoading">
        <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i> Confirm &amp; Register</span>
        <span *ngIf="isLoading">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span> Registering…
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
