## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/pages/vat-registration-create/vat-registration-create.component.css
```css
/* vat-registration-create.component.css
   Sections:
   1. Wizard Step Indicator
   2. Step Edit Button
   3. Company Notice
   4. Update Link
   5. Draft Recovery Banner
   6. VAT Category Radio Cards
   7. Currency Prefix Input
   8. Field Hint Text
   9. Business Verified Info-Box
  10. Document Upload Section      ← NEW
  11. Review Modal — Tabular Layout
*/
⋮----
/* ── 1. Wizard Step Indicator ────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.wizard-steps {
⋮----
.wizard-step {
⋮----
.ws-circle {
⋮----
.wizard-step.active  .ws-circle { background: var(--color-accent); color: var(--color-text-inverse); }
.wizard-step.done    .ws-circle { background: var(--color-teal);   color: var(--color-text-inverse); }
.wizard-step.skipped .ws-circle { background: var(--color-accent-light); color: var(--color-accent); font-size: 12px; }
⋮----
.ws-label {
⋮----
.wizard-step.active .ws-label { color: var(--color-accent); }
.wizard-step.done   .ws-label { color: var(--color-teal); }
⋮----
.wizard-connector {
⋮----
.wizard-connector.done { background: var(--color-teal); }
⋮----
/* ── 2. Step Edit Button ─────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.btn-edit-step {
⋮----
.btn-edit-step:hover { background: #d0e6f7; color: var(--color-accent-dark); }
⋮----
/* ── 3. Company Notice ───────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.company-notice {
⋮----
.company-notice i { font-size: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; }
⋮----
/* ── 4. Update Link ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.update-link {
⋮----
.update-link:hover { background: #d0e6f7; text-decoration: none; color: var(--color-accent-dark); }
⋮----
/* ── 5. Draft Recovery Banner ────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.draft-banner {
⋮----
.draft-banner-left {
⋮----
.draft-banner-left i { font-size: 18px; color: var(--color-warning); flex-shrink: 0; }
.draft-banner-left strong { display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-text-primary); margin-bottom: 1px; }
.draft-banner-left span   { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: var(--color-text-secondary); }
⋮----
.draft-banner-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; }
⋮----
.draft-btn-continue {
⋮----
.draft-btn-continue:hover { background: var(--color-orange-dark); }
⋮----
.draft-btn-discard {
⋮----
.draft-btn-discard:hover { background: var(--color-bg-secondary); color: var(--color-danger); border-color: var(--color-danger-border); }
⋮----
/* ── 6. VAT Category Radio Cards ─────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.radio-group {
⋮----
.radio-opt {
⋮----
.radio-opt:hover { border-color: var(--color-accent-mid); background: var(--color-accent-light); }
⋮----
.radio-opt.selected {
⋮----
.radio-input-hidden {
⋮----
.radio-dot {
⋮----
.radio-opt.selected .radio-dot { border-color: var(--color-accent-mid); }
⋮----
.radio-dot-inner {
⋮----
.radio-opt.selected .radio-dot-inner { display: block; }
.radio-opt-label { line-height: 1.3; }
⋮----
/* ── 7. Currency Prefix Input ────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.input-prefix {
⋮----
.input-prefix:focus-within {
⋮----
.input-prefix.locked { background: var(--color-bg-secondary); }
⋮----
.prefix-symbol {
⋮----
.prefix-input {
⋮----
.prefix-input:focus       { box-shadow: none !important; outline: none; }
.prefix-input[readonly]   { background: var(--color-bg-secondary); color: var(--color-text-secondary); cursor: not-allowed; }
⋮----
/* ── 8. Field Hint Text ──────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.field-hint {
⋮----
/* ── 9. Business Verified Info-Box ───────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.verified-notice {
⋮----
.verified-notice i { font-size: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; color: var(--color-accent-mid); }
⋮----
/* ── 10. Document Upload Section ─────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.doc-upload-list {
⋮----
/* One document row */
.doc-upload-row {
⋮----
.doc-upload-row:last-child  { border-bottom: none; }
.doc-upload-row:hover       { background: var(--color-bg-secondary); }
⋮----
/* Left side: icon + label block */
.doc-upload-left {
⋮----
/* File type icon */
.doc-icon {
⋮----
.doc-icon.uploaded {
⋮----
/* Text block */
.doc-info {
⋮----
.doc-label {
⋮----
.doc-filename {
⋮----
.doc-filesize {
⋮----
.doc-hint {
⋮----
/* Right side: action area */
.doc-upload-right {
⋮----
/* Uploaded status badge */
.doc-status-uploaded {
⋮----
/* Remove button */
.btn-remove-doc {
⋮----
.btn-remove-doc:hover {
⋮----
/* Upload button — styled label wrapping hidden file input */
.btn-upload-doc {
⋮----
.btn-upload-doc:hover {
⋮----
/* Visually hidden file input — triggered by the label above */
.file-input-hidden {
⋮----
/* Upload count badge in section header */
.upload-count-badge {
⋮----
/* ── 11. Review Modal — Tabular Layout ───────────────────────── */
⋮----
.review-modal-card {
⋮----
.review-modal-card .modal-accent {
⋮----
.review-modal-header {
⋮----
.review-scroll-body {
⋮----
.review-scroll-body::-webkit-scrollbar       { width: 4px; }
.review-scroll-body::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
.review-scroll-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--color-border-primary); border-radius: 4px; }
⋮----
.summary-section {
⋮----
.summary-section:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
⋮----
.summary-section-label {
⋮----
.summary-row {
⋮----
.summary-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
⋮----
.summary-key {
⋮----
.summary-val {
⋮----
/* Uploaded status in review modal */
⋮----
/* Not-uploaded in review modal */
.doc-pending {
⋮----
.review-declaration {
⋮----
.declaration-label {
⋮----
.declaration-label input[type="checkbox"] {
⋮----
.declaration-label span {
⋮----
.review-modal-card .modal-actions {
⋮----
.review-modal-card .btn-modal-confirm:disabled {
⋮----
/* ── Responsive ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.wizard-steps           { padding: 14px 16px 0; }
.ws-label               { display: none; }
⋮----
.draft-banner           { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; }
.draft-banner-actions   { width: 100%; }
.draft-btn-continue,
⋮----
.radio-group            { flex-direction: column; }
.radio-opt              { min-width: unset; }
⋮----
.doc-upload-row         { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; }
.doc-upload-right       { width: 100%; justify-content: flex-end; }
.doc-filename           { max-width: 100%; }
⋮----
.review-modal-card      { max-width: 100%; }
.review-scroll-body     { max-height: 46vh; }
.summary-key            { min-width: 80px; }
```

## File: src/app/models/taxpayer.model.ts
```typescript
import { TaxpayerType } from './master-data.model';
⋮----
export type TaxpayerStatus = 'Active' | 'Inactive' | 'Pending' | 'Suspended';
⋮----
export interface Address {
  houseNo?: string;
  roadVillage?: string;
  ward?: string;
  thana: string;
  district: string;
  division: string;
  postalCode?: string;
}
⋮----
export interface Taxpayer {
  id?: number;
  tinNumber?: string;
  taxpayerType: TaxpayerType;

  // Individual fields
  fullName?: string;
  gender?: 'Male' | 'Female' | 'Other';
  fathersName?: string;
  mothersName?: string;
  maritalStatus?: 'Single' | 'Married' | 'Divorced' | 'Widowed';
  nid?: string;
  dateOfBirth?: string;
  profession?: string;
  photoPath?: string;

  // Company fields
  companyName?: string;
  incorporationDate?: string;
  tradeLicenseNo?: string;
  rjscNo?: string;
  natureOfBusiness?: string;

  // Authorized Person Info
  authorizedPersonName?: string;
  authorizedPersonNid?: string;
  authorizedPersonDesignation?: string;

  // Contact & Address
  email: string;
  phone: string;
  presentAddress?: Address;
  permanentAddress?: Address;
  sameAsPermanent?: boolean;

  status: TaxpayerStatus;
  registrationDate?: string;
```
